1→# 问卷考试系统设计文档
     2→
     3→> 日期：2026-04-09
     4→
     5→## 1. 概述
     6→
     7→基于 OA 系统的在线考试平台，支持管理员通过 AI Skill 从 txt 题库批量导入单选题，创建试卷并发布给员工考试，自动评分并提供成绩与题目分析。
     8→
     9→### 1.1 业务需求
    10→
    11→1. 支持上传题库（txt），通过 AI Skill 解析并转成结构化题目
    12→2. 试卷支持配置：动态抽题数、是否显示答案及解析
    13→3. 得分统计和分析：每个人的最终分数、每道题的正答率
    14→4. 实名制（OA 登录）
    15→
    16→### 1.2 用户角色
    17→
    18→| 角色 | 说明 |
    19→|------|------|
    20→| 管理员 | 后端配置 `is_admin` 字段，可管理试卷、查看分析 |
    21→| 普通用户 | OA 登录后参加考试、查看自己的成绩 |
    22→
    23→## 2. 技术栈
    24→
    25→| 层 | 技术 |
    26→|----|------|
    27→| 后端 | Spring Boot + MyBatis-Plus + Spring Security OAuth2 Client |
    28→| 前端 | React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + TailwindCSS 4 + Radix UI + TanStack Router/Query |
    29→| 数据库 | MySQL |
    30→| 认证 | OA OAuth2/SSO |
    31→| 代码规范 | Biome (前端) |
    32→| 国际化 | i18next + react-i18next |
    33→
    34→## 3. 架构
    35→
    36→经典单体架构：一个 Spring Boot 应用 + 一个 React SPA。
    37→
    38→```
    39→┌──────────┐     ┌──────────────┐     ┌───────┐
    40→│  React   │────▶│  Spring Boot │────▶│ MySQL │
    41→│   SPA    │ API │   (REST)     │     │       │
    42→└──────────┘     └──────────────┘     └───────┘
    43→                       ▲
    44→                       │ API
    45→                 ┌─────┴──────┐
    46→                 │  AI Skill  │
    47→                 │ (题库导入)  │
    48→                 └────────────┘
    49→```
    50→
    51→预期并发规模：100-500 人同时考试。
    52→
    53→## 4. 数据库设计
    54→
    55→### 4.1 sys_user（用户表）
    56→
    57→| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
    58→|------|------|------|
    59→| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
    60→| oa_user_id | VARCHAR(64) | OA 系统用户 ID，唯一索引 |
    61→| username | VARCHAR(64) | 用户名 |
    62→| display_name | VARCHAR(64) | 显示名称 |
    63→| is_admin | TINYINT(1) | 是否管理员，默认 0 |
    64→| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |
    65→| updated_at | DATETIME | 更新时间 |
    66→
    67→### 4.2 exam（试卷表）
    68→
    69→| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
    70→|------|------|------|
    71→| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
    72→| title | VARCHAR(200) | 试卷名称 |
    73→| status | VARCHAR(20) | 状态：draft / published / closed |
    74→| time_limit_min | INT | 考试时限（分钟），0 = 不限时 |
    75→| show_answer | TINYINT(1) | 交卷后是否显示正确答案 |
    76→| show_analysis | TINYINT(1) | 交卷后是否显示解析 |
    77→| question_count | INT | 动态抽题数，0 = 全部题目 |
    78→| max_attempts | INT | 最大考试次数，0 = 不限 |
    79→| access_mode | VARCHAR(20) | 访问模式：open / whitelist |
    80→| created_by | BIGINT FK | 创建者（sys_user.id） |
    81→| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |
    82→| updated_at | DATETIME | 更新时间 |
    83→
    84→### 4.3 question_bank（题库表）
    85→
    86→| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
    87→|------|------|------|
    88→| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
    89→| exam_id | BIGINT FK | 关联试卷 |
    90→| content | TEXT | 题目内容 |
    91→| option_a | VARCHAR(500) | 选项 A |
    92→| option_b | VARCHAR(500) | 选项 B |
    93→| option_c | VARCHAR(500) | 选项 C |
    94→| option_d | VARCHAR(500) | 选项 D |
    95→| correct_answer | CHAR(1) | 正确答案：A/B/C/D |
    96→| analysis | TEXT | 解析说明 |
    97→| sort_order | INT | 排序序号 |
    98→| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |
    99→
   100→### 4.4 exam_whitelist（白名单表）
   101→
   102→| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
   103→|------|------|------|
   104→| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
   105→| exam_id | BIGINT FK | 关联试卷 |
   106→| user_id | BIGINT FK | 关联用户 |
   107→| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |
   108→
   109→唯一索引：`(exam_id, user_id)`
   110→
   111→### 4.5 exam_record（考试记录表）
   112→
   113→| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
   114→|------|------|------|
   115→| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
   116→| exam_id | BIGINT FK | 关联试卷 |
   117→| user_id | BIGINT FK | 关联用户 |
   118→| score | DECIMAL(5,2) | 得分 |
   119→| start_time | DATETIME | 开始时间 |
   120→| end_time | DATETIME | 结束时间 |
   121→| status | VARCHAR(20) | 状态：in_progress / submitted / timeout |
   122→| attempt_no | INT | 第几次考试 |
   123→| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |
   124→
   125→索引：`(exam_id, user_id)`
   126→
   127→### 4.6 exam_record_question（抽题记录表）
   128→
   129→| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
   130→|------|------|------|
   131→| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
   132→| record_id | BIGINT FK | 关联考试记录 |
   133→| question_id | BIGINT FK | 关联题目 |
   134→| sort_order | INT | 本次考试中的题序 |
   135→
   136→### 4.7 answer_detail（答题详情表）
   137→
   138→| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
   139→|------|------|------|
   140→| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
   141→| record_id | BIGINT FK | 关联考试记录 |
   142→| question_id | BIGINT FK | 关联题目 |
   143→| user_answer | CHAR(1) | 用户选择的答案 |
   144→| is_correct | TINYINT(1) | 是否正确 |
   145→| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |
   146→
   147→唯一索引：`(record_id, question_id)`
   148→
   149→## 5. API 接口设计
   150→
   151→### 5.1 认证
   152→
   153→| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
   154→|------|------|------|
   155→| GET | `/api/auth/oauth2/login` | 跳转 OA SSO 登录 |
   156→| GET | `/api/auth/oauth2/callback` | SSO 回调，创建/更新用户，返回 JWT |
   157→| GET | `/api/auth/me` | 获取当前用户信息 |
   158→
   159→认证方式：JWT Token，通过 `Authorization: Bearer <token>` 传递。
   160→
   161→### 5.2 试卷管理（管理员）
   162→
   163→| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
   164→|------|------|------|
   165→| GET | `/api/admin/exams` | 试卷列表（分页，含答题人数统计） |
   166→| POST | `/api/admin/exams` | 创建试卷 |
   167→| PUT | `/api/admin/exams/{id}` | 修改试卷配置 |
   168→| DELETE | `/api/admin/exams/{id}` | 删除试卷（仅 draft 状态） |
   169→| PUT | `/api/admin/exams/{id}/publish` | 发布试卷 |
   170→| PUT | `/api/admin/exams/{id}/close` | 关闭试卷 |
   171→
   172→### 5.3 题目管理（管理员 + Skill）
   173→
   174→| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
   175→|------|------|------|
   176→| GET | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions` | 获取题目列表 |
   177→| POST | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions` | 单个添加题目 |
   178→| POST | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions/batch` | Skill 批量导入题目 |
   179→| PUT | `/api/admin/questions/{id}` | 修改题目 |
   180→| DELETE | `/api/admin/questions/{id}` | 删除题目 |
   181→
   182→**批量导入请求体**：
   183→
   184→```json
   185→{
   186→  "questions": [
   187→    {
   188→      "content": "题目内容",
   189→      "optionA": "选项A",
   190→      "optionB": "选项B",
   191→      "optionC": "选项C",
   192→      "optionD": "选项D",
   193→      "correctAnswer": "A",
   194→      "analysis": "解析说明"
   195→    }
   196→  ]
   197→}
   198→```
   199→
   200→### 5.4 白名单管理（管理员）
   201→
   202→| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
   203→|------|------|------|
   204→| GET | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/whitelist` | 获取白名单 |
   205→| POST | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/whitelist` | 批量添加白名单用户 |
   206→| DELETE | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/whitelist` | 批量移除白名单用户 |
   207→
   208→### 5.5 试卷分析（管理员）
   209→
   210→| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
   211→|------|------|------|
   212→| GET | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/analysis/scores` | 得分情况（分页） |
   213→| GET | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/analysis/questions` | 题目正答率分析 |
   214→
   215→### 5.6 考生端
   216→
   217→| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
   218→|------|------|------|
   219→| GET | `/api/exams` | 我的考试列表 |
   220→| GET | `/api/exams/{id}` | 试卷详情（含剩余次数） |
   221→| POST | `/api/exams/{id}/start` | 开始考试，返回抽到的题目 |
   222→| POST | `/api/exams/{id}/submit` | 提交答卷，自动评分 |
   223→| GET | `/api/records` | 我的考试记录 |
   224→| GET | `/api/records/{id}` | 考试结果详情 |
   225→
   226→## 6. 前端路由 & 页面
   227→
   228→### 6.1 路由
   229→
   230→```
   231→/login                       → OA SSO 跳转
   232→/oauth/callback              → SSO 回调处理
   233→
   234→/                            → 重定向到 /exams
   235→/exams                       → 我的考试列表
   236→/exams/:id                   → 考试详情（开始前说明页）
   237→/exams/:id/take              → 答题页面
   238→/records                     → 考试记录列表
   239→/records/:id                 → 考试结果详情
   240→
   241→/admin/exams                 → 试卷管理列表
   242→/admin/exams/create          → 创建试卷
   243→/admin/exams/:id/edit        → 编辑试卷配置
   244→/admin/exams/:id/questions   → 题目管理
   245→/admin/exams/:id/whitelist   → 白名单管理
   246→/admin/exams/:id/analysis    → 试卷分析
   247→```
   248→
   249→### 6.2 布局
   250→
   251→```
   252→┌─────────────────────────────────┐
   253→│  Header (Logo + 用户名 + 退出)   │
   254→├────────┬────────────────────────┤
   255→│  Side  │     Content Area       │
   256→│  Nav   │                        │
   257→│        │                        │
   258→│ 我的考试│                        │
   259→│ 考试记录│                        │
   260→│ ────── │                        │
   261→│ 试卷管理│ (管理员可见)             │
   262→└────────┴────────────────────────┘
   263→```
   264→
   265→### 6.3 核心页面
   266→
   267→**考生端**：
   268→
   269→| 页面 | 核心交互 |
   270→|------|---------|
   271→| 我的考试 | 卡片/列表展示可参加的试卷，状态标签 |
   272→| 考试详情 | 试卷名称、题数、时限、剩余次数，"开始考试"按钮 |
   273→| 答题页 | 单选 Radio 逐题展示，限时考试顶部倒计时，到时自动提交 |
   274→| 考试记录 | 历史记录列表，得分、时间 |
   275→| 结果详情 | 得分概览 + 每题回顾（根据配置决定是否显示答案/解析） |
   276→
   277→**管理端**：
   278→
   279→| 页面 | 核心交互 |
   280→|------|---------|
   281→| 试卷列表 | 表格展示，状态筛选、答题人数，操作列 |
   282→| 创建/编辑试卷 | 表单：标题、限时、抽题数、显示设置、考试次数、开放模式 |
   283→| 题目管理 | 题目列表 + 手动添加/编辑/删除 |
   284→| 白名单 | 搜索 OA 用户添加，列表展示 |
   285→| 试卷分析 | Tab 切换：得分情况（表格）、题目分析（正答率） |
   286→
   287→## 7. AI Skill 定义
   288→
   289→### 7.1 职责
   290→
   291→读取用户提供的 txt 题库文件 → 解析/AI 生成结构化单选题目 → 调用考试系统 API 批量写入。
   292→
   293→### 7.2 工作流
   294→
   295→```
   296→用户提供 txt 文件路径 + 目标试卷 ID + API 地址 + Token
   297→        ↓
   298→Skill 读取 txt 文件内容
   299→        ↓
   300→AI 解析题目结构（题干、选项、正确答案、解析）
   301→        ↓
   302→组装成 JSON 数组
   303→        ↓
   304→调用 POST /api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions/batch
   305→        ↓
   306→返回导入结果（成功数、失败数、失败原因）
   307→```
   308→
   309→### 7.3 Skill 参数
   310→
   311→| 参数 | 说明 |
   312→|------|------|
   313→| filePath | txt 题库文件路径 |
   314→| examId | 目标试卷 ID |
   315→| apiBaseUrl | 考试系统 API 地址 |
   316→| token | 管理员认证 Token |
   317→
   318→## 8. 核心业务逻辑
   319→
   320→### 8.1 动态抽题
   321→
   322→- `question_count = 0` 或 `>= 题库总数`：返回全部题目
   323→- 否则：从题库随机抽取 `question_count` 道题
   324→- 抽到的题目顺序随机打乱
   325→- 抽题结果写入 `exam_record_question`，保证同一次考试题目一致
   326→
   327→### 8.2 自动评分
   328→
   329→- 逐题对比 `user_answer` 与 `correct_answer`
   330→- 每题等分：`100 / 实际题目数`
   331→- 总分写入 `exam_record.score`
   332→- 每题对错写入 `answer_detail.is_correct`
   333→
   334→### 8.3 限时考试
   335→
   336→- 开始考试时服务端记录 `start_time`
   337→- 提交时服务端校验：`now() - start_time <= time_limit_min`
   338→- 超时仍接受提交，标记 `status = timeout`
   339→- 前端倒计时仅做展示，**服务端时间为准**
   340→
   341→### 8.4 重考控制
   342→
   343→- 提交前查询 `exam_record` 已完成次数
   344→- `已完成次数 >= max_attempts`（且 `max_attempts > 0`）：拒绝开始
   345→- `max_attempts = 0`：不限次数
   346→
   347→### 8.5 试卷可见性
   348→
   349→- `access_mode = open`：所有 OA 用户可见
   350→- `access_mode = whitelist`：仅白名单用户可见
   351→- 两种模式都需要 `status = published`
   352→
   353→### 8.6 试卷状态流转
   354→
   355→```
   356→draft → published → closed
   357→          ↑            │
   358→          └────────────┘ (可重新开放)
   359→```
   360→
   361→- `draft`：可编辑题目和配置，不可考试
   362→- `published`：可考试，不可修改题目
   363→- `closed`：停止考试，可查看分析
   364→- 仅 `draft` 状态可删除
   365→
   366→## 9. 后端项目结构
   367→
   368→```
   369→exam-system/
   370→├── src/main/java/com/exam/
   371→│   ├── ExamApplication.java
   372→│   ├── config/              # 配置类（Security, OAuth2, MyBatis, CORS）
   373→│   ├── controller/
   374→│   │   ├── AuthController.java
   375→│   │   ├── admin/           # 管理端接口
   376→│   │   │   ├── AdminExamController.java
   377→│   │   │   ├── AdminQuestionController.java
   378→│   │   │   ├── AdminWhitelistController.java
   379→│   │   │   └── AdminAnalysisController.java
   380→│   │   └── ExamController.java        # 考生端接口
   381→│   ├── service/
   382→│   │   ├── AuthService.java
   383→│   │   ├── ExamService.java
   384→│   │   ├── QuestionService.java
   385→│   │   ├── ExamRecordService.java
   386→│   │   └── AnalysisService.java
   387→│   ├── mapper/              # MyBatis-Plus Mapper
   388→│   ├── entity/              # 数据库实体
   389→│   ├── dto/                 # 请求/响应 DTO
   390→│   ├── enums/               # 枚举（ExamStatus, AccessMode 等）
   391→│   ├── exception/           # 业务异常
   392→│   └── util/                # 工具类
   393→├── src/main/resources/
   394→│   ├── application.yml
   395→│   └── mapper/              # MyBatis XML（如需复杂 SQL）
   396→└── pom.xml
   397→```
   398→
   399→## 10. 前端项目结构
   400→
   401→```
   402→exam-web/
   403→├── src/
   404→│   ├── main.tsx
   405→│   ├── routes/              # TanStack Router 文件路由
   406→│   │   ├── __root.tsx
   407→│   │   ├── login.tsx

   410→│   │   ├── _layout/

# 问卷考试系统设计文档

> 日期：2026-04-09

## 1. 概述

基于 OA 系统的在线考试平台，支持管理员通过 AI Skill 从 txt 题库批量导入单选题，创建试卷并发布给员工考试，自动评分并提供成绩与题目分析。

### 1.1 业务需求

1. 支持上传题库（txt），通过 AI Skill 解析并转成结构化题目
2. 试卷支持配置：动态抽题数、是否显示答案及解析
3. 得分统计和分析：每个人的最终分数、每道题的正答率
4. 实名制（OA 登录）

### 1.2 用户角色

| 角色 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| 管理员 | 后端配置 `is_admin` 字段，可管理试卷、查看分析 |
| 普通用户 | OA 登录后参加考试、查看自己的成绩 |

## 2. 技术栈

| 层 | 技术 |
|----|------|
| 后端 | Spring Boot + MyBatis-Plus + Spring Security OAuth2 Client |
| 前端 | React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + TailwindCSS 4 + Radix UI + TanStack Router/Query |
| 数据库 | MySQL |
| 认证 | OA OAuth2/SSO |
| 代码规范 | Biome (前端) |
| 国际化 | i18next + react-i18next |

## 3. 架构

经典单体架构：一个 Spring Boot 应用 + 一个 React SPA。

```
┌──────────┐     ┌──────────────┐     ┌───────┐
│  React   │────▶│  Spring Boot │────▶│ MySQL │
│   SPA    │ API │   (REST)     │     │       │
└──────────┘     └──────────────┘     └───────┘
                       ▲
                       │ API
                 ┌─────┴──────┐
                 │  AI Skill  │
                 │ (题库导入)  │
                 └────────────┘
```

预期并发规模：100-500 人同时考试。

## 4. 数据库设计

### 4.1 sys_user（用户表）

| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
| oa_user_id | VARCHAR(64) | OA 系统用户 ID，唯一索引 |
| username | VARCHAR(64) | 用户名 |
| display_name | VARCHAR(64) | 显示名称 |
| is_admin | TINYINT(1) | 是否管理员，默认 0 |
| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |
| updated_at | DATETIME | 更新时间 |

### 4.2 exam（试卷表）

| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
| title | VARCHAR(200) | 试卷名称 |
| status | VARCHAR(20) | 状态：draft / published / closed |
| time_limit_min | INT | 考试时限（分钟），0 = 不限时 |
| show_answer | TINYINT(1) | 交卷后是否显示正确答案 |
| show_analysis | TINYINT(1) | 交卷后是否显示解析 |
| question_count | INT | 动态抽题数，0 = 全部题目 |
| max_attempts | INT | 最大考试次数，0 = 不限 |
| access_mode | VARCHAR(20) | 访问模式：open / whitelist |
| created_by | BIGINT FK | 创建者（sys_user.id） |
| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |
| updated_at | DATETIME | 更新时间 |

### 4.3 question_bank（题库表）

| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
| exam_id | BIGINT FK | 关联试卷 |
| content | TEXT | 题目内容 |
| option_a | VARCHAR(500) | 选项 A |
| option_b | VARCHAR(500) | 选项 B |
| option_c | VARCHAR(500) | 选项 C |
| option_d | VARCHAR(500) | 选项 D |
| correct_answer | CHAR(1) | 正确答案：A/B/C/D |
| analysis | TEXT | 解析说明 |
| sort_order | INT | 排序序号 |
| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |

### 4.4 exam_whitelist（白名单表）

| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
| exam_id | BIGINT FK | 关联试卷 |
| user_id | BIGINT FK | 关联用户 |
| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |

唯一索引：`(exam_id, user_id)`

### 4.5 exam_record（考试记录表）

| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
| exam_id | BIGINT FK | 关联试卷 |
| user_id | BIGINT FK | 关联用户 |
| score | DECIMAL(5,2) | 得分 |
| start_time | DATETIME | 开始时间 |
| end_time | DATETIME | 结束时间 |
| status | VARCHAR(20) | 状态：in_progress / submitted / timeout |
| attempt_no | INT | 第几次考试 |
| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |

索引：`(exam_id, user_id)`

### 4.6 exam_record_question（抽题记录表）

| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
| record_id | BIGINT FK | 关联考试记录 |
| question_id | BIGINT FK | 关联题目 |
| sort_order | INT | 本次考试中的题序 |

### 4.7 answer_detail（答题详情表）

| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK | 自增主键 |
| record_id | BIGINT FK | 关联考试记录 |
| question_id | BIGINT FK | 关联题目 |
| user_answer | CHAR(1) | 用户选择的答案 |
| is_correct | TINYINT(1) | 是否正确 |
| created_at | DATETIME | 创建时间 |

唯一索引：`(record_id, question_id)`

## 5. API 接口设计

### 5.1 认证

| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| GET | `/api/auth/oauth2/login` | 跳转 OA SSO 登录 |
| GET | `/api/auth/oauth2/callback` | SSO 回调，创建/更新用户，返回 JWT |
| GET | `/api/auth/me` | 获取当前用户信息 |

认证方式：JWT Token，通过 `Authorization: Bearer <token>` 传递。

### 5.2 试卷管理（管理员）

| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| GET | `/api/admin/exams` | 试卷列表（分页，含答题人数统计） |
| POST | `/api/admin/exams` | 创建试卷 |
| PUT | `/api/admin/exams/{id}` | 修改试卷配置 |
| DELETE | `/api/admin/exams/{id}` | 删除试卷（仅 draft 状态） |
| PUT | `/api/admin/exams/{id}/publish` | 发布试卷 |
| PUT | `/api/admin/exams/{id}/close` | 关闭试卷 |

### 5.3 题目管理（管理员 + Skill）

| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| GET | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions` | 获取题目列表 |
| POST | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions` | 单个添加题目 |
| POST | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions/batch` | Skill 批量导入题目 |
| PUT | `/api/admin/questions/{id}` | 修改题目 |
| DELETE | `/api/admin/questions/{id}` | 删除题目 |

**批量导入请求体**：

```json
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "content": "题目内容",
      "optionA": "选项A",
      "optionB": "选项B",
      "optionC": "选项C",
      "optionD": "选项D",
      "correctAnswer": "A",
      "analysis": "解析说明"
    }
  ]
}
```

### 5.4 白名单管理（管理员）

| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| GET | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/whitelist` | 获取白名单 |
| POST | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/whitelist` | 批量添加白名单用户 |
| DELETE | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/whitelist` | 批量移除白名单用户 |

### 5.5 试卷分析（管理员）

| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| GET | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/analysis/scores` | 得分情况（分页） |
| GET | `/api/admin/exams/{examId}/analysis/questions` | 题目正答率分析 |

### 5.6 考生端

| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| GET | `/api/exams` | 我的考试列表 |
| GET | `/api/exams/{id}` | 试卷详情（含剩余次数） |
| POST | `/api/exams/{id}/start` | 开始考试，返回抽到的题目 |
| POST | `/api/exams/{id}/submit` | 提交答卷，自动评分 |
| GET | `/api/records` | 我的考试记录 |
| GET | `/api/records/{id}` | 考试结果详情 |

## 6. 前端路由 & 页面

### 6.1 路由

```
/login                       → OA SSO 跳转
/oauth/callback              → SSO 回调处理

/                            → 重定向到 /exams
/exams                       → 我的考试列表
/exams/:id                   → 考试详情（开始前说明页）
/exams/:id/take              → 答题页面
/records                     → 考试记录列表
/records/:id                 → 考试结果详情

/admin/exams                 → 试卷管理列表
/admin/exams/create          → 创建试卷
/admin/exams/:id/edit        → 编辑试卷配置
/admin/exams/:id/questions   → 题目管理
/admin/exams/:id/whitelist   → 白名单管理
/admin/exams/:id/analysis    → 试卷分析
```

### 6.2 布局

```
┌─────────────────────────────────┐
│  Header (Logo + 用户名 + 退出)   │
├────────┬────────────────────────┤
│  Side  │     Content Area       │
│  Nav   │                        │
│        │                        │
│ 我的考试│                        │
│ 考试记录│                        │
│ ────── │                        │
│ 试卷管理│ (管理员可见)             │
└────────┴────────────────────────┘
```

### 6.3 核心页面

**考生端**：

| 页面 | 核心交互 |
|------|---------|
| 我的考试 | 卡片/列表展示可参加的试卷，状态标签 |
| 考试详情 | 试卷名称、题数、时限、剩余次数，"开始考试"按钮 |
| 答题页 | 单选 Radio 逐题展示，限时考试顶部倒计时，到时自动提交 |
| 考试记录 | 历史记录列表，得分、时间 |
| 结果详情 | 得分概览 + 每题回顾（根据配置决定是否显示答案/解析） |

**管理端**：

| 页面 | 核心交互 |
|------|---------|
| 试卷列表 | 表格展示，状态筛选、答题人数，操作列 |
| 创建/编辑试卷 | 表单：标题、限时、抽题数、显示设置、考试次数、开放模式 |
| 题目管理 | 题目列表 + 手动添加/编辑/删除 |
| 白名单 | 搜索 OA 用户添加，列表展示 |
| 试卷分析 | Tab 切换：得分情况（表格）、题目分析（正答率） |

## 7. AI Skill 定义

### 7.1 职责

读取用户提供的 txt 题库文件 → 解析/AI 生成结构化单选题目 → 调用考试系统 API 批量写入。

### 7.2 工作流

```
用户提供 txt 文件路径 + 目标试卷 ID + API 地址 + Token
        ↓
Skill 读取 txt 文件内容
        ↓
AI 解析题目结构（题干、选项、正确答案、解析）
        ↓
组装成 JSON 数组
        ↓
调用 POST /api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions/batch
        ↓
返回导入结果（成功数、失败数、失败原因）
```

### 7.3 Skill 参数

| 参数 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| filePath | txt 题库文件路径 |
| examId | 目标试卷 ID |
| apiBaseUrl | 考试系统 API 地址 |
| token | 管理员认证 Token |

## 8. 核心业务逻辑

### 8.1 动态抽题

- `question_count = 0` 或 `>= 题库总数`：返回全部题目
- 否则：从题库随机抽取 `question_count` 道题
- 抽到的题目顺序随机打乱
- 抽题结果写入 `exam_record_question`，保证同一次考试题目一致

### 8.2 自动评分

- 逐题对比 `user_answer` 与 `correct_answer`
- 每题等分：`100 / 实际题目数`
- 总分写入 `exam_record.score`
- 每题对错写入 `answer_detail.is_correct`

### 8.3 限时考试

- 开始考试时服务端记录 `start_time`
- 提交时服务端校验：`now() - start_time <= time_limit_min`
- 超时仍接受提交，标记 `status = timeout`
- 前端倒计时仅做展示，**服务端时间为准**

### 8.4 重考控制

- 提交前查询 `exam_record` 已完成次数
- `已完成次数 >= max_attempts`（且 `max_attempts > 0`）：拒绝开始
- `max_attempts = 0`：不限次数

### 8.5 试卷可见性

- `access_mode = open`：所有 OA 用户可见
- `access_mode = whitelist`：仅白名单用户可见
- 两种模式都需要 `status = published`

### 8.6 试卷状态流转

```
draft → published → closed
          ↑            │
          └────────────┘ (可重新开放)
```

- `draft`：可编辑题目和配置，不可考试
- `published`：可考试，不可修改题目
- `closed`：停止考试，可查看分析
- 仅 `draft` 状态可删除

## 9. 后端项目结构

```
exam-system/
├── src/main/java/com/exam/
│   ├── ExamApplication.java
│   ├── config/              # 配置类（Security, OAuth2, MyBatis, CORS）
│   ├── controller/
│   │   ├── AuthController.java
│   │   ├── admin/           # 管理端接口
│   │   │   ├── AdminExamController.java
│   │   │   ├── AdminQuestionController.java
│   │   │   ├── AdminWhitelistController.java
│   │   │   └── AdminAnalysisController.java
│   │   └── ExamController.java        # 考生端接口
│   ├── service/
│   │   ├── AuthService.java
│   │   ├── ExamService.java
│   │   ├── QuestionService.java
│   │   ├── ExamRecordService.java
│   │   └── AnalysisService.java
│   ├── mapper/              # MyBatis-Plus Mapper
│   ├── entity/              # 数据库实体
│   ├── dto/                 # 请求/响应 DTO
│   ├── enums/               # 枚举（ExamStatus, AccessMode 等）
│   ├── exception/           # 业务异常
│   └── util/                # 工具类
├── src/main/resources/

# 考试系统实施计划

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** 构建基于 OA 登录的在线考试系统，支持 AI Skill 导入题库、动态抽题、自动评分、成绩分析。

**Architecture:** Spring Boot 单体后端提供 REST API，React SPA 前端通过 TanStack Router/Query 消费接口。OA OAuth2/SSO 认证，JWT 维持会话。

**Tech Stack:** Spring Boot + MyBatis-Plus + Spring Security / React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + TailwindCSS 4 + Radix UI + TanStack Router/Query + i18next

**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-09-exam-system-design.md`

---

## Task 1: 后端项目脚手架

**Files:**
- Create: `exam-system/pom.xml`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/ExamApplication.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/resources/application.yml`

- [ ] **Step 1:** 创建 `pom.xml`，引入依赖：spring-boot-starter-web, spring-boot-starter-security, mybatis-plus-spring-boot3-starter, mysql-connector, jjwt (io.jsonwebtoken), lombok, spring-boot-starter-test
- [ ] **Step 2:** 创建 `ExamApplication.java` 启动类
- [ ] **Step 3:** 创建 `application.yml`，配置 MySQL 数据源、JWT secret/expiration、OAuth2 client 参数（client-id, client-secret, authorization-uri, token-uri, user-info-uri）、CORS 允许的 origin
- [ ] **Step 4:** 运行 `mvn spring-boot:run` 确认启动成功
- [ ] **Step 5:** Commit `feat: init backend project scaffolding`

---

## Task 2: 数据库 DDL + 实体类 + 枚举

**Files:**
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/entity/` (7 个实体)
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/enums/` (3 个枚举)

- [ ] **Step 1:** 编写 `schema.sql`，包含 7 张表（sys_user, exam, question_bank, exam_whitelist, exam_record, exam_record_question, answer_detail），按设计文档定义字段、索引、唯一约束
- [ ] **Step 2:** 创建 3 个枚举类：`ExamStatus`(draft/published/closed)、`AccessMode`(open/whitelist)、`RecordStatus`(in_progress/submitted/timeout)
- [ ] **Step 3:** 创建 7 个实体类，使用 MyBatis-Plus 注解 `@TableName` `@TableId` `@TableField`，字段与 DDL 一一对应
- [ ] **Step 4:** 执行 `schema.sql` 建表，启动项目确认无报错
- [ ] **Step 5:** Commit `feat: add database schema and entity classes`

# 考试系统实施计划

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** 构建基于 OA 登录的在线考试系统，支持 AI Skill 导入题库、动态抽题、自动评分、成绩分析。

**Architecture:** Spring Boot 单体后端提供 REST API，React SPA 前端通过 TanStack Router/Query 消费接口。OA OAuth2/SSO 认证，JWT 维持会话。

**Tech Stack:** Spring Boot + MyBatis-Plus + Spring Security / React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + TailwindCSS 4 + Radix UI + TanStack Router/Query + i18next

**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-09-exam-system-design.md`

---

- [ ] **Step 2:** 创建 `ExamApplication.java` 启动类
- [ ] **Step 3:** 创建 `application.yml`，配置 MySQL 数据源、JWT secret/expiration、OAuth2 client 参数（client-id, client-secret, authorization-uri, token-uri, user-info-uri）、CORS 允许的 origin

- [ ] **Step 1:** `Result<T>` — 统一返回体，字段：code, message, data。提供静态方法 `ok(data)`, `fail(errorCode)`
- [ ] **Step 2:** `ErrorCode` — 错误码枚举（UNAUTHORIZED, FORBIDDEN, NOT_FOUND, BAD_REQUEST, EXAM_NOT_DRAFT, EXAM_ALREADY_PUBLISHED, MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED, EXAM_TIME_EXPIRED 等）

- [ ] **Step 5:** `JwtUtil` — 从 application.yml 读 secret 和 expiration，提供 `generateToken(userId, isAdmin)`, `parseToken(token)` 返回 userId + isAdmin

- [ ] **Step 8:** `MyBatisPlusConfig` — 注册分页插件 PaginationInnerInterceptor

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\luobeilin\.claude\plugins\cache\claude-plugins-official\superpowers\5.0.6\skills\subagent-driven-development

# Subagent-Driven Development

Execute plan by dispatching fresh subagent per task, with two-stage review after each: spec compliance review first, then code quality review.

**Why subagents:** You delegate tasks to specialized agents with isolated context. By precisely crafting their instructions and context, you ensure they stay focused and succeed at their task. They should never inherit your session's context or history — you construct exactly what they need. This also preserves your own context for coordination work.

**Core principle:** Fresh subagent per task + two-stage review (spec then quality) = high quality, fast iteration

## When to Use

```dot
digraph when_to_use {
    "Have implementation plan?" [shape=diamond];
    "Tasks mostly independent?" [shape=diamond];
    "Stay in this session?" [shape=diamond];
    "subagent-driven-development" [shape=box];
    "executing-plans" [shape=box];
    "Manual execution or brainstorm first" [shape=box];

    "Have implementation plan?" -> "Tasks mostly independent?" [label="yes"];
    "Have implementation plan?" -> "Manual execution or brainstorm first" [label="no"];
    "Tasks mostly independent?" -> "Stay in this session?" [label="yes"];
    "Tasks mostly independent?" -> "Manual execution or brainstorm first" [label="no - tightly coupled"];
    "Stay in this session?" -> "subagent-driven-development" [label="yes"];
    "Stay in this session?" -> "executing-plans" [label="no - parallel session"];
}
```

**vs. Executing Plans (parallel session):**
- Same session (no context switch)
- Fresh subagent per task (no context pollution)
- Two-stage review after each task: spec compliance first, then code quality
- Faster iteration (no human-in-loop between tasks)

## The Process

```dot
digraph process {
    rankdir=TB;

    subgraph cluster_per_task {
        label="Per Task";
        "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)" [shape=box];
        "Implementer subagent asks questions?" [shape=diamond];
        "Answer questions, provide context" [shape=box];
        "Implementer subagent implements, tests, commits, self-reviews" [shape=box];
        "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)" [shape=box];
        "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?" [shape=diamond];
        "Implementer subagent fixes spec gaps" [shape=box];
        "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" [shape=box];
        "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?" [shape=diamond];
        "Implementer subagent fixes quality issues" [shape=box];
        "Mark task complete in TodoWrite" [shape=box];
    }

    "Read plan, extract all tasks with full text, note context, create TodoWrite" [shape=box];
    "More tasks remain?" [shape=diamond];
    "Dispatch final code reviewer subagent for entire implementation" [shape=box];
    "Use superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch" [shape=box style=filled fillcolor=lightgreen];

    "Read plan, extract all tasks with full text, note context, create TodoWrite" -> "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)";
    "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)" -> "Implementer subagent asks questions?";
    "Implementer subagent asks questions?" -> "Answer questions, provide context" [label="yes"];
    "Answer questions, provide context" -> "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)";
    "Implementer subagent asks questions?" -> "Implementer subagent implements, tests, commits, self-reviews" [label="no"];
    "Implementer subagent implements, tests, commits, self-reviews" -> "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)";
    "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)" -> "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?";
    "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?" -> "Implementer subagent fixes spec gaps" [label="no"];
    "Implementer subagent fixes spec gaps" -> "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)" [label="re-review"];
    "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?" -> "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" [label="yes"];
    "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" -> "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?";
    "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?" -> "Implementer subagent fixes quality issues" [label="no"];
    "Implementer subagent fixes quality issues" -> "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" [label="re-review"];
    "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?" -> "Mark task complete in TodoWrite" [label="yes"];
    "Mark task complete in TodoWrite" -> "More tasks remain?";
    "More tasks remain?" -> "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)" [label="yes"];
    "More tasks remain?" -> "Dispatch final code reviewer subagent for entire implementation" [label="no"];
    "Dispatch final code reviewer subagent for entire implementation" -> "Use superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch";
}
```

## Model Selection

Use the least powerful model that can handle each role to conserve cost and increase speed.

**Mechanical implementation tasks** (isolated functions, clear specs, 1-2 files): use a fast, cheap model. Most implementation tasks are mechanical when the plan is well-specified.

**Integration and judgment tasks** (multi-file coordination, pattern matching, debugging): use a standard model.

**Architecture, design, and review tasks**: use the most capable available model.

**Task complexity signals:**
- Touches 1-2 files with a complete spec → cheap model
- Touches multiple files with integration concerns → standard model
- Requires design judgment or broad codebase understanding → most capable model

## Handling Implementer Status

Implementer subagents report one of four statuses. Handle each appropriately:

**DONE:** Proceed to spec compliance review.

**DONE_WITH_CONCERNS:** The implementer completed the work but flagged doubts. Read the concerns before proceeding. If the concerns are about correctness or scope, address them before review. If they're observations (e.g., "this file is getting large"), note them and proceed to review.

**NEEDS_CONTEXT:** The implementer needs information that wasn't provided. Provide the missing context and re-dispatch.

**BLOCKED:** The implementer cannot complete the task. Assess the blocker:
1. If it's a context problem, provide more context and re-dispatch with the same model
2. If the task requires more reasoning, re-dispatch with a more capable model
3. If the task is too large, break it into smaller pieces
4. If the plan itself is wrong, escalate to the human

**Never** ignore an escalation or force the same model to retry without changes. If the implementer said it's stuck, something needs to change.

## Prompt Templates

- `./implementer-prompt.md` - Dispatch implementer subagent
- `./spec-reviewer-prompt.md` - Dispatch spec compliance reviewer subagent
- `./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md` - Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent

## Example Workflow

```
You: I'm using Subagent-Driven Development to execute this plan.

[Read plan file once: docs/superpowers/plans/feature-plan.md]
[Extract all 5 tasks with full text and context]
[Create TodoWrite with all tasks]

Task 1: Hook installation script

[Get Task 1 text and context (already extracted)]
[Dispatch implementation subagent with full task text + context]

Implementer: "Before I begin - should the hook be installed at user or system level?"

You: "User level (~/.config/superpowers/hooks/)"

Implementer: "Got it. Implementing now..."
[Later] Implementer:
  - Implemented install-hook command
  - Added tests, 5/5 passing
  - Self-review: Found I missed --force flag, added it
  - Committed

[Dispatch spec compliance reviewer]
Spec reviewer: ✅ Spec compliant - all requirements met, nothing extra

[Get git SHAs, dispatch code quality reviewer]
Code reviewer: Strengths: Good test coverage, clean. Issues: None. Approved.

[Mark Task 1 complete]

Task 2: Recovery modes

[Get Task 2 text and context (already extracted)]
[Dispatch implementation subagent with full task text + context]

Implementer: [No questions, proceeds]
Implementer:
  - Added verify/repair modes
  - 8/8 tests passing
  - Self-review: All good
  - Committed

[Dispatch spec compliance reviewer]
Spec reviewer: ❌ Issues:
  - Missing: Progress reporting (spec says "report every 100 items")
  - Extra: Added --json flag (not requested)

[Implementer fixes issues]
Implementer: Removed --json flag, added progress reporting

[Spec reviewer reviews again]
Spec reviewer: ✅ Spec compliant now

[Dispatch code quality reviewer]
Code reviewer: Strengths: Solid. Issues (Important): Magic number (100)

[Implementer fixes]
Implementer: Extracted PROGRESS_INTERVAL constant

[Code reviewer reviews again]
Code reviewer: ✅ Approved

[Mark Task 2 complete]

...

[After all tasks]
[Dispatch final code-reviewer]
Final reviewer: All requirements met, ready to merge

Done!
```

## Advantages

**vs. Manual execution:**
- Subagents follow TDD naturally
- Fresh context per task (no confusion)
- Parallel-safe (subagents don't interfere)
- Subagent can ask questions (before AND during work)

**vs. Executing Plans:**
- Same session (no handoff)
- Continuous progress (no waiting)
- Review checkpoints automatic

**Efficiency gains:**
- No file reading overhead (controller provides full text)
- Controller curates exactly what context is needed
- Subagent gets complete information upfront
- Questions surfaced before work begins (not after)

**Quality gates:**
- Self-review catches issues before handoff
- Two-stage review: spec compliance, then code quality
- Review loops ensure fixes actually work
- Spec compliance prevents over/under-building
- Code quality ensures implementation is well-built

**Cost:**
- More subagent invocations (implementer + 2 reviewers per task)
- Controller does more prep work (extracting all tasks upfront)
- Review loops add iterations
- But catches issues early (cheaper than debugging later)

## Red Flags

**Never:**
- Start implementation on main/master branch without explicit user consent
- Skip reviews (spec compliance OR code quality)
- Proceed with unfixed issues
- Dispatch multiple implementation subagents in parallel (conflicts)
- Make subagent read plan file (provide full text instead)
- Skip scene-setting context (subagent needs to understand where task fits)
- Ignore subagent questions (answer before letting them proceed)
- Accept "close enough" on spec compliance (spec reviewer found issues = not done)
- Skip review loops (reviewer found issues = implementer fixes = review again)
- Let implementer self-review replace actual review (both are needed)
- **Start code quality review before spec compliance is ✅** (wrong order)
- Move to next task while either review has open issues

**If subagent asks questions:**
- Answer clearly and completely
- Provide additional context if needed
- Don't rush them into implementation

**If reviewer finds issues:**
- Implementer (same subagent) fixes them
- Reviewer reviews again
- Repeat until approved
- Don't skip the re-review

**If subagent fails task:**
- Dispatch fix subagent with specific instructions
- Don't try to fix manually (context pollution)

## Integration

**Required workflow skills:**
- **superpowers:using-git-worktrees** - REQUIRED: Set up isolated workspace before starting
- **superpowers:writing-plans** - Creates the plan this skill executes
- **superpowers:requesting-code-review** - Code review template for reviewer subagents
- **superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch** - Complete development after all tasks

**Subagents should use:**
- **superpowers:test-driven-development** - Subagents follow TDD for each task

**Alternative workflow:**
- **superpowers:executing-plans** - Use for parallel session instead of same-session execution

# 考试系统实施计划

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** 构建基于 OA 登录的在线考试系统，支持 AI Skill 导入题库、动态抽题、自动评分、成绩分析。

**Architecture:** Spring Boot 单体后端提供 REST API，React SPA 前端通过 TanStack Router/Query 消费接口。OA OAuth2/SSO 认证，JWT 维持会话。

**Tech Stack:** Spring Boot + MyBatis-Plus + Spring Security / React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + TailwindCSS 4 + Radix UI + TanStack Router/Query + i18next

**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-09-exam-system-design.md`

---

## Task 1: 后端项目脚手架

**Files:**
- Create: `exam-system/pom.xml`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/ExamApplication.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/resources/application.yml`

- [ ] **Step 1:** 创建 `pom.xml`，引入依赖：spring-boot-starter-web, spring-boot-starter-security, mybatis-plus-spring-boot3-starter, mysql-connector, jjwt (io.jsonwebtoken), lombok, spring-boot-starter-test
- [ ] **Step 2:** 创建 `ExamApplication.java` 启动类
- [ ] **Step 3:** 创建 `application.yml`，配置 MySQL 数据源、JWT secret/expiration、OAuth2 client 参数（client-id, client-secret, authorization-uri, token-uri, user-info-uri）、CORS 允许的 origin
- [ ] **Step 4:** 运行 `mvn spring-boot:run` 确认启动成功
- [ ] **Step 5:** Commit `feat: init backend project scaffolding`

---

## Task 2: 数据库 DDL + 实体类 + 枚举

**Files:**
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/entity/` (7 个实体)
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/enums/` (3 个枚举)

- [ ] **Step 1:** 编写 `schema.sql`，包含 7 张表（sys_user, exam, question_bank, exam_whitelist, exam_record, exam_record_question, answer_detail），按设计文档定义字段、索引、唯一约束
- [ ] **Step 2:** 创建 3 个枚举类：`ExamStatus`(draft/published/closed)、`AccessMode`(open/whitelist)、`RecordStatus`(in_progress/submitted/timeout)
- [ ] **Step 3:** 创建 7 个实体类，使用 MyBatis-Plus 注解 `@TableName` `@TableId` `@TableField`，字段与 DDL 一一对应
- [ ] **Step 4:** 执行 `schema.sql` 建表，启动项目确认无报错
- [ ] **Step 5:** Commit `feat: add database schema and entity classes`

---

## Task 3: 通用基础设施

**Files:**
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/Result.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/exception/ErrorCode.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/exception/BizException.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/util/JwtUtil.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/SecurityConfig.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/MyBatisPlusConfig.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/CorsConfig.java`

- [ ] **Step 1:** `Result<T>` — 统一返回体，字段：code, message, data。提供静态方法 `ok(data)`, `fail(errorCode)`
- [ ] **Step 2:** `ErrorCode` — 错误码枚举（UNAUTHORIZED, FORBIDDEN, NOT_FOUND, BAD_REQUEST, EXAM_NOT_DRAFT, EXAM_ALREADY_PUBLISHED, MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED, EXAM_TIME_EXPIRED 等）
- [ ] **Step 3:** `BizException` — 业务异常，持有 ErrorCode
- [ ] **Step 4:** `GlobalExceptionHandler` — @RestControllerAdvice，捕获 BizException 返回对应 code+message，捕获其他异常返回 500
- [ ] **Step 5:** `JwtUtil` — 从 application.yml 读 secret 和 expiration，提供 `generateToken(userId, isAdmin)`, `parseToken(token)` 返回 userId + isAdmin
- [ ] **Step 6:** `JwtAuthenticationFilter` — OncePerRequestFilter，从 Header 解析 JWT，设置 SecurityContext。白名单路径（/api/auth/**）跳过
- [ ] **Step 7:** `SecurityConfig` — 禁用 CSRF、session stateless、配置路径权限（/api/admin/** 需要 isAdmin、/api/** 需要认证、/api/auth/** 放行）、注册 JwtAuthenticationFilter
- [ ] **Step 8:** `MyBatisPlusConfig` — 注册分页插件 PaginationInnerInterceptor
- [ ] **Step 9:** `CorsConfig` — 从 yml 读取允许的 origin，配置 allowedMethods/Headers
- [ ] **Step 10:** 编写 `JwtUtilTest` 测试 token 生成和解析
- [ ] **Step 11:** 启动项目，用 curl 访问 /api/auth/me 确认返回 401
- [ ] **Step 12:** Commit `feat: add common infrastructure (Result, exception, JWT, security)`

---

- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/service/AuthService.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/controller/AuthController.java`

- [ ] **Step 1:** `SysUserMapper` — 继承 BaseMapper<SysUser>
- [ ] **Step 2:** `UserInfo` — DTO，字段：id, oaUserId, username, displayName, isAdmin
- [ ] **Step 3:** `AuthService` — 方法：`handleOAuthCallback(code)` 用 code 换 access_token，调 OA user-info 接口获取用户信息，upsert sys_user（按 oa_user_id 查，有则更新，无则创建），返回 JWT；`getCurrentUser(userId)` 查库返回 UserInfo
- [ ] **Step 4:** `AuthController` — 三个接口：`GET /api/auth/oauth2/login` 重定向到 OA 授权页；`GET /api/auth/oauth2/callback` 调 AuthService 处理回调返回 JWT；`GET /api/auth/me` 返回当前用户信息
- [ ] **Step 5:** 启动测试，确认 /api/auth/oauth2/login 返回 302 重定向
- [ ] **Step 6:** Commit `feat: add OAuth2 authentication module`

## Task 5: 前端项目脚手架

- [ ] **Step 2:** 创建 Vite 配置，设置 React SWC 插件 + TailwindCSS 插件 + TanStack Router 插件 + API 代理 (`/api` → `http://localhost:8080`)

file.content:
# Spec Compliance Reviewer Prompt Template

Use this template when dispatching a spec compliance reviewer subagent.

**Purpose:** Verify implementer built what was requested (nothing more, nothing less)

```
Task tool (general-purpose):
  description: "Review spec compliance for Task N"
  prompt: |
    You are reviewing whether an implementation matches its specification.

    ## What Was Requested

    [FULL TEXT of task requirements]

    ## What Implementer Claims They Built

    [From implementer's report]

    ## CRITICAL: Do Not Trust the Report

    The implementer finished suspiciously quickly. Their report may be incomplete,
    inaccurate, or optimistic. You MUST verify everything independently.

    **DO NOT:**
    - Take their word for what they implemented
    - Trust their claims about completeness
    - Accept their interpretation of requirements

    **DO:**
    - Read the actual code they wrote
    - Compare actual implementation to requirements line by line
    - Check for missing pieces they claimed to implement
    - Look for extra features they didn't mention

    ## Your Job

    Read the implementation code and verify:

    **Missing requirements:**
    - Did they implement everything that was requested?
    - Are there requirements they skipped or missed?
    - Did they claim something works but didn't actually implement it?

    **Extra/unneeded work:**
    - Did they build things that weren't requested?
    - Did they over-engineer or add unnecessary features?
    - Did they add "nice to haves" that weren't in spec?

    **Misunderstandings:**
    - Did they interpret requirements differently than intended?
    - Did they solve the wrong problem?
    - Did they implement the right feature but wrong way?

    **Verify by reading code, not by trusting report.**

    Report:
    - ✅ Spec compliant (if everything matches after code inspection)
    - ❌ Issues found: [list specifically what's missing or extra, with file:line references]
```

file.content:
# Implementer Subagent Prompt Template

Use this template when dispatching an implementer subagent.

```
Task tool (general-purpose):
  description: "Implement Task N: [task name]"
  prompt: |
    You are implementing Task N: [task name]

    ## Task Description

    [FULL TEXT of task from plan - paste it here, don't make subagent read file]

    ## Context

    [Scene-setting: where this fits, dependencies, architectural context]

    ## Before You Begin

    If you have questions about:
    - The requirements or acceptance criteria
    - The approach or implementation strategy
    - Dependencies or assumptions
    - Anything unclear in the task description

    **Ask them now.** Raise any concerns before starting work.

    ## Your Job

    Once you're clear on requirements:
    1. Implement exactly what the task specifies
    2. Write tests (following TDD if task says to)
    3. Verify implementation works
    4. Commit your work
    5. Self-review (see below)
    6. Report back

    Work from: [directory]

    **While you work:** If you encounter something unexpected or unclear, **ask questions**.
    It's always OK to pause and clarify. Don't guess or make assumptions.

    ## Code Organization

    You reason best about code you can hold in context at once, and your edits are more
    reliable when files are focused. Keep this in mind:
    - Follow the file structure defined in the plan
    - Each file should have one clear responsibility with a well-defined interface
    - If a file you're creating is growing beyond the plan's intent, stop and report
      it as DONE_WITH_CONCERNS — don't split files on your own without plan guidance
    - If an existing file you're modifying is already large or tangled, work carefully
      and note it as a concern in your report
    - In existing codebases, follow established patterns. Improve code you're touching
      the way a good developer would, but don't restructure things outside your task.

    ## When You're in Over Your Head

    It is always OK to stop and say "this is too hard for me." Bad work is worse than
    no work. You will not be penalized for escalating.

    **STOP and escalate when:**
    - The task requires architectural decisions with multiple valid approaches
    - You need to understand code beyond what was provided and can't find clarity
    - You feel uncertain about whether your approach is correct
    - The task involves restructuring existing code in ways the plan didn't anticipate
    - You've been reading file after file trying to understand the system without progress

    **How to escalate:** Report back with status BLOCKED or NEEDS_CONTEXT. Describe
    specifically what you're stuck on, what you've tried, and what kind of help you need.
    The controller can provide more context, re-dispatch with a more capable model,
    or break the task into smaller pieces.

    ## Before Reporting Back: Self-Review

    Review your work with fresh eyes. Ask yourself:

    **Completeness:**
    - Did I fully implement everything in the spec?
    - Did I miss any requirements?
    - Are there edge cases I didn't handle?

    **Quality:**
    - Is this my best work?
    - Are names clear and accurate (match what things do, not how they work)?
    - Is the code clean and maintainable?

    **Discipline:**
    - Did I avoid overbuilding (YAGNI)?
    - Did I only build what was requested?
    - Did I follow existing patterns in the codebase?

    **Testing:**
    - Do tests actually verify behavior (not just mock behavior)?
    - Did I follow TDD if required?
    - Are tests comprehensive?

    If you find issues during self-review, fix them now before reporting.

    ## Report Format

    When done, report:
    - **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
    - What you implemented (or what you attempted, if blocked)
    - What you tested and test results
    - Files changed
    - Self-review findings (if any)
    - Any issues or concerns

    Use DONE_WITH_CONCERNS if you completed the work but have doubts about correctness.
    Use BLOCKED if you cannot complete the task. Use NEEDS_CONTEXT if you need
    information that wasn't provided. Never silently produce work you're unsure about.
```

file.content:
# Code Quality Reviewer Prompt Template

Use this template when dispatching a code quality reviewer subagent.

**Purpose:** Verify implementation is well-built (clean, tested, maintainable)

**Only dispatch after spec compliance review passes.**

```
Task tool (superpowers:code-reviewer):
  Use template at requesting-code-review/code-reviewer.md

  WHAT_WAS_IMPLEMENTED: [from implementer's report]
  PLAN_OR_REQUIREMENTS: Task N from [plan-file]
  BASE_SHA: [commit before task]
  HEAD_SHA: [current commit]
  DESCRIPTION: [task summary]
```

**In addition to standard code quality concerns, the reviewer should check:**
- Does each file have one clear responsibility with a well-defined interface?
- Are units decomposed so they can be understood and tested independently?
- Is the implementation following the file structure from the plan?
- Did this implementation create new files that are already large, or significantly grow existing files? (Don't flag pre-existing file sizes — focus on what this change contributed.)

**Code reviewer returns:** Strengths, Issues (Critical/Important/Minor), Assessment

input.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>3.2.5</version>
        <relativePath/>
    </parent>

    <groupId>com.exam</groupId>
    <artifactId>exam-system</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
    <name>exam-system</name>
    <description>Exam System Backend</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>17</java.version>
        <mybatis-plus.version>3.5.6</mybatis-plus.version>
        <jjwt.version>0.12.5</jjwt.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Spring Boot Web -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Spring Security -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- MyBatis-Plus (Spring Boot 3.x) -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId>
            <artifactId>mybatis-plus-spring-boot3-starter</artifactId>
            <version>${mybatis-plus.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- MySQL Connector -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.mysql</groupId>
            <artifactId>mysql-connector-j</artifactId>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- JWT (io.jsonwebtoken) -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Lombok -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
            <optional>true</optional>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Test -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <excludes>
                        <exclude>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                        </exclude>
                    </excludes>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

input.content:
server:
  port: ${SERVER_PORT:8080}

spring:
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:mysql://${DB_HOST:localhost}:${DB_PORT:3306}/${DB_NAME:exam_system}?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf-8&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true
    username: ${DB_USERNAME:root}
    password: ${DB_PASSWORD:root}
    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver

  security:
    oauth2:
      client:
        registration:
          default:
            client-id: ${OAUTH2_CLIENT_ID:exam-client}
            client-secret: ${OAUTH2_CLIENT_SECRET:exam-secret}
            authorization-grant-type: authorization_code
            redirect-uri: "{baseUrl}/login/oauth2/code/{registrationId}"
            scope: openid,profile,email
        provider:
          default:
            authorization-uri: ${OAUTH2_AUTH_URI:http://localhost:9000/oauth2/authorize}
            token-uri: ${OAUTH2_TOKEN_URI:http://localhost:9000/oauth2/token}
            user-info-uri: ${OAUTH2_USERINFO_URI:http://localhost:9000/userinfo}

# MyBatis-Plus
mybatis-plus:
  mapper-locations: classpath*:/mapper/**/*.xml
  configuration:
    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true
    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl
  global-config:
    db-config:
      id-type: auto
      logic-delete-field: deleted
      logic-delete-value: 1
      logic-not-delete-value: 0

# JWT
jwt:
  secret: ${JWT_SECRET:YmFzZTY0LWVuY29kZWQtc2VjcmV0LWtleS1mb3ItZXhhbS1zeXN0ZW0tand0}
  expiration: ${JWT_EXPIRATION:86400000}

# CORS
cors:
  allowed-origins: ${CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS:http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:3000}

# Logging
logging:
  level:
    com.exam: debug

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>3.2.5</version>
        <relativePath/>
    </parent>

    <groupId>com.exam</groupId>
    <artifactId>exam-system</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
    <name>exam-system</name>
    <description>Exam System Backend</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>17</java.version>
        <mybatis-plus.version>3.5.6</mybatis-plus.version>
        <jjwt.version>0.12.5</jjwt.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Spring Boot Web -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Spring Security -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- MyBatis-Plus (Spring Boot 3.x) -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId>
            <artifactId>mybatis-plus-spring-boot3-starter</artifactId>
            <version>${mybatis-plus.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- MySQL Connector -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.mysql</groupId>
            <artifactId>mysql-connector-j</artifactId>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- JWT (io.jsonwebtoken) -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Lombok -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
            <optional>true</optional>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Test -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <excludes>
                        <exclude>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                        </exclude>
                    </excludes>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

file.content:
server:
  port: ${SERVER_PORT:8080}

spring:
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:mysql://${DB_HOST:localhost}:${DB_PORT:3306}/${DB_NAME:exam_system}?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf-8&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true
    username: ${DB_USERNAME:root}
    password: ${DB_PASSWORD:root}
    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver

  security:
    oauth2:
      client:
        registration:
          default:
            client-id: ${OAUTH2_CLIENT_ID:exam-client}
            client-secret: ${OAUTH2_CLIENT_SECRET:exam-secret}
            authorization-grant-type: authorization_code
            redirect-uri: "{baseUrl}/login/oauth2/code/{registrationId}"
            scope: openid,profile,email
        provider:
          default:
            authorization-uri: ${OAUTH2_AUTH_URI:http://localhost:9000/oauth2/authorize}
            token-uri: ${OAUTH2_TOKEN_URI:http://localhost:9000/oauth2/token}
            user-info-uri: ${OAUTH2_USERINFO_URI:http://localhost:9000/userinfo}

# MyBatis-Plus
mybatis-plus:
  mapper-locations: classpath*:/mapper/**/*.xml
  configuration:
    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true
    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl
  global-config:
    db-config:
      id-type: auto
      logic-delete-field: deleted
      logic-delete-value: 1
      logic-not-delete-value: 0

# JWT
jwt:
  secret: ${JWT_SECRET:YmFzZTY0LWVuY29kZWQtc2VjcmV0LWtleS1mb3ItZXhhbS1zeXN0ZW0tand0}
  expiration: ${JWT_EXPIRATION:86400000}

# CORS
cors:
  allowed-origins: ${CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS:http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:3000}

# Logging
logging:
  level:
    com.exam: debug

You are implementing Task 2: 数据库 DDL + 实体类 + 枚举

## Task Description

**Files:**
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/entity/SysUser.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/entity/Exam.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/entity/QuestionBank.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/entity/ExamWhitelist.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/entity/ExamRecord.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/entity/ExamRecordQuestion.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/entity/AnswerDetail.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/enums/ExamStatus.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/enums/AccessMode.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/enums/RecordStatus.java`

**Steps:**
- **Step 1:** 编写 `schema.sql`，包含 7 张表（sys_user, exam, question_bank, exam_whitelist, exam_record, exam_record_question, answer_detail），按设计文档定义字段、索引、唯一约束
- **Step 2:** 创建 3 个枚举类：`ExamStatus`(draft/published/closed)、`AccessMode`(open/whitelist)、`RecordStatus`(in_progress/submitted/timeout)
- **Step 3:** 创建 7 个实体类，使用 MyBatis-Plus 注解 `@TableName` `@TableId` `@TableField`，字段与 DDL 一一对应

## Database Schema Reference

### sys_user
| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK AUTO_INCREMENT | 自增主键 |
| oa_user_id | VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE NOT NULL | OA 系统用户 ID |
| username | VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL | 用户名 |
| display_name | VARCHAR(64) | 显示名称 |
| is_admin | TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 | 是否管理员 |
| created_at | DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | 创建时间 |
| updated_at | DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | 更新时间 |

### exam
| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK AUTO_INCREMENT | 自增主键 |
| title | VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL | 试卷名称 |
| status | VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' | draft/published/closed |
| time_limit_min | INT DEFAULT 0 | 考试时限（分钟），0=不限时 |
| show_answer | TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 | 交卷后是否显示正确答案 |
| show_analysis | TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 | 交卷后是否显示解析 |
| question_count | INT DEFAULT 0 | 动态抽题数，0=全部 |
| max_attempts | INT DEFAULT 0 | 最大考试次数，0=不限 |
| access_mode | VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open' | open/whitelist |
| created_by | BIGINT NOT NULL | 创建者 FK sys_user.id |
| created_at | DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | |
| updated_at | DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | |

### question_bank
| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK AUTO_INCREMENT | |
| exam_id | BIGINT NOT NULL | FK exam.id |
| content | TEXT NOT NULL | 题目内容 |
| option_a | VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL | |
| option_b | VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL | |
| option_c | VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL | |
| option_d | VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL | |
| correct_answer | CHAR(1) NOT NULL | A/B/C/D |
| analysis | TEXT | 解析 |
| sort_order | INT DEFAULT 0 | |
| created_at | DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | |

Index: exam_id

### exam_whitelist
| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK AUTO_INCREMENT | |
| exam_id | BIGINT NOT NULL | |
| user_id | BIGINT NOT NULL | |
| created_at | DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | |

UNIQUE INDEX: (exam_id, user_id)

### exam_record
| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK AUTO_INCREMENT | |
| exam_id | BIGINT NOT NULL | |
| user_id | BIGINT NOT NULL | |
| score | DECIMAL(5,2) | |
| start_time | DATETIME NOT NULL | |
| end_time | DATETIME | |
| status | VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'in_progress' | in_progress/submitted/timeout |
| attempt_no | INT NOT NULL | 第几次考试 |
| created_at | DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | |

INDEX: (exam_id, user_id)

### exam_record_question
| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK AUTO_INCREMENT | |
| record_id | BIGINT NOT NULL | FK exam_record.id |
| question_id | BIGINT NOT NULL | FK question_bank.id |
| sort_order | INT DEFAULT 0 | 本次考试中的题序 |

### answer_detail
| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| id | BIGINT PK AUTO_INCREMENT | |
| record_id | BIGINT NOT NULL | FK exam_record.id |
| question_id | BIGINT NOT NULL | FK question_bank.id |
| user_answer | CHAR(1) | |
| is_correct | TINYINT(1) | |
| created_at | DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | |

UNIQUE INDEX: (record_id, question_id)

Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/
All files go under exam-system/ subdirectory.
Use Lombok (@Data, @Builder, @NoArgsConstructor, @AllArgsConstructor) on entity classes.
Use MyBatis-Plus annotations (@TableName, @TableId(type = IdType.AUTO), @TableField).
Enums should implement IEnum<String> from MyBatis-Plus for automatic serialization, with a getValue() method returning the lowercase string value.
Use LocalDateTime for datetime fields.

input.content:
-- ============================================================
-- Exam System DDL
-- ============================================================

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sys_user` (
    `id`           BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `oa_user_id`   VARCHAR(64)  NOT NULL COMMENT 'OA 系统用户 ID',
    `username`     VARCHAR(64)  NOT NULL COMMENT '用户名',
    `display_name` VARCHAR(64)  NULL     COMMENT '显示名称',
    `is_admin`     TINYINT(1)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否管理员',
    `created_at`   DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at`   DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE INDEX `uk_oa_user_id` (`oa_user_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='系统用户';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam` (
    `id`              BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `title`           VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL COMMENT '试卷名称',
    `status`          VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' COMMENT 'draft/published/closed',
    `time_limit_min`  INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '考试时限（分钟），0=不限时',
    `show_answer`     TINYINT(1)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '交卷后是否显示正确答案',
    `show_analysis`   TINYINT(1)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '交卷后是否显示解析',
    `question_count`  INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '动态抽题数，0=全部',
    `max_attempts`    INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '最大考试次数，0=不限',
    `access_mode`     VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open' COMMENT 'open/whitelist',
    `created_by`      BIGINT       NOT NULL COMMENT '创建者 FK sys_user.id',
    `created_at`      DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at`      DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_created_by` (`created_by`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `question_bank` (
    `id`              BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `exam_id`         BIGINT       NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK exam.id',
    `content`         TEXT         NOT NULL COMMENT '题目内容',
    `option_a`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `option_b`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `option_c`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `option_d`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `correct_answer`  CHAR(1)      NOT NULL COMMENT 'A/B/C/D',
    `analysis`        TEXT         NULL     COMMENT '解析',
    `sort_order`      INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `created_at`      DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_exam_id` (`exam_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='题库';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_whitelist` (
    `id`         BIGINT   NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `exam_id`    BIGINT   NOT NULL,
    `user_id`    BIGINT   NOT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE INDEX `uk_exam_user` (`exam_id`, `user_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试白名单';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_record` (
    `id`         BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `exam_id`    BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    `user_id`    BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    `score`      DECIMAL(5,2) NULL     COMMENT '得分',
    `start_time` DATETIME     NOT NULL COMMENT '开始时间',
    `end_time`   DATETIME     NULL     COMMENT '结束时间',
    `status`     VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'in_progress' COMMENT 'in_progress/submitted/timeout',
    `attempt_no` INT          NOT NULL COMMENT '第几次考试',
    `created_at` DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_exam_user` (`exam_id`, `user_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试记录';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_record_question` (
    `id`          BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `record_id`   BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK exam_record.id',
    `question_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK question_bank.id',
    `sort_order`  INT    NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '本次考试中的题序',
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_record_id` (`record_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试记录-题目关联';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `answer_detail` (
    `id`          BIGINT     NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `record_id`   BIGINT     NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK exam_record.id',
    `question_id` BIGINT     NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK question_bank.id',
    `user_answer` CHAR(1)    NULL     COMMENT '用户答案',
    `is_correct`  TINYINT(1) NULL     COMMENT '是否正确',
    `created_at`  DATETIME   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE INDEX `uk_record_question` (`record_id`, `question_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='答题明细';

input.prompt:
You are implementing Task 3: 通用基础设施

## Task Description

**Files to Create:**
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/Result.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/exception/ErrorCode.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/exception/BizException.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/util/JwtUtil.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/SecurityConfig.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/MyBatisPlusConfig.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/CorsConfig.java`

**Steps:**
1. `Result<T>` — 统一返回体，字段：code(int), message(String), data(T)。静态方法 `ok(data)`, `ok()`, `fail(ErrorCode)`, `fail(int code, String message)`
2. `ErrorCode` — 错误码枚举，每个枚举值有 code(int) 和 message(String)。包含：
   - SUCCESS(200, "操作成功")
   - BAD_REQUEST(400, "请求参数错误")
   - UNAUTHORIZED(401, "未登录或登录已过期")
   - FORBIDDEN(403, "无权限访问")
   - NOT_FOUND(404, "资源不存在")
   - INTERNAL_ERROR(500, "系统内部错误")
   - EXAM_NOT_DRAFT(1001, "试卷非草稿状态，不可操作")
   - EXAM_NOT_PUBLISHED(1002, "试卷未发布")
   - EXAM_NO_QUESTIONS(1003, "试卷没有题目，不可发布")
   - MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED(1004, "已达最大考试次数")
   - EXAM_IN_PROGRESS(1005, "存在进行中的考试")
   - RECORD_NOT_FOUND(1006, "考试记录不存在")
   - RECORD_ALREADY_SUBMITTED(1007, "考试已提交")
3. `BizException` — RuntimeException 子类，持有 ErrorCode 字段，构造方法接收 ErrorCode
4. `GlobalExceptionHandler` — @RestControllerAdvice，处理：
   - BizException → 返回 Result.fail(bizException.getErrorCode())
   - MethodArgumentNotValidException → 返回 Result.fail(400, 第一个校验错误信息)
   - Exception → 返回 Result.fail(ErrorCode.INTERNAL_ERROR)，log.error 记录异常
5. `JwtUtil` — @Component，从 application.yml 读取 jwt.secret 和 jwt.expiration（用 @Value）。方法：
   - `generateToken(Long userId, Boolean isAdmin)` → 返回 JWT 字符串，claims 包含 userId 和 isAdmin
   - `parseToken(String token)` → 返回 Claims 对象
   - `getUserId(String token)` → Long
   - `getIsAdmin(String token)` → Boolean
   - 使用 io.jsonwebtoken (JJWT 0.12.x API)，签名算法 HS256，secret 用 Keys.hmacShaKeyFor(Decoders.BASE64.decode(secret))
6. `JwtAuthenticationFilter` — extends OncePerRequestFilter，从 Authorization: Bearer <token> 解析 JWT，成功则创建 UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken 设到 SecurityContextHolder。白名单路径（/api/auth/**）直接放行不解析。token 无效/过期则不设认证信息，让后续 Security 返回 401。
7. `SecurityConfig` — @Configuration @EnableWebSecurity，配置：
   - csrf disabled
   - sessionManagement STATELESS
   - authorizeHttpRequests: /api/auth/** permitAll, /api/admin/** 需要 ROLE_ADMIN, 其余 /api/** authenticated
   - 注册 JwtAuthenticationFilter 在 UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter 之前
   - 异常处理：authenticationEntryPoint 返回 JSON 401，accessDeniedHandler 返回 JSON 403
8. `MyBatisPlusConfig` — @Configuration，@Bean MybatisPlusInterceptor 注册 PaginationInnerInterceptor(DbType.MYSQL)
9. `CorsConfig` — @Configuration implements WebMvcConfigurer，从 application.yml 读 cors.allowed-origins（@Value），addCorsMappings 配置 /api/** 允许 GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/OPTIONS，允许 Authorization 和 Content-Type header，allowCredentials true

   - SUCCESS(200, "操作成功")
   - BAD_REQUEST(400, "请求参数错误")
   - UNAUTHORIZED(401, "未登录或登录已过期")
   - FORBIDDEN(403, "无权限访问")
   - NOT_FOUND(404, "资源不存在")
   - INTERNAL_ERROR(500, "系统内部错误")
   - EXAM_NOT_DRAFT(1001, "试卷非草稿状态，不可操作")
   - EXAM_NOT_PUBLISHED(1002, "试卷未发布")
   - EXAM_NO_QUESTIONS(1003, "试卷没有题目，不可发布")
   - MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED(1004, "已达最大考试次数")
   - EXAM_IN_PROGRESS(1005, "存在进行中的考试")
   - RECORD_NOT_FOUND(1006, "考试记录不存在")
   - RECORD_ALREADY_SUBMITTED(1007, "考试已提交")
3. `BizException` — RuntimeException 子类，持有 ErrorCode 字段，构造方法接收 ErrorCode
4. `GlobalExceptionHandler` — @RestControllerAdvice，处理：
   - BizException → 返回 Result.fail(bizException.getErrorCode())
   - MethodArgumentNotValidException → 返回 Result.fail(400, 第一个校验错误信息)
   - Exception → 返回 Result.fail(ErrorCode.INTERNAL_ERROR)，log.error 记录异常
5. `JwtUtil` — @Component，从 application.yml 读取 jwt.secret 和 jwt.expiration（用 @Value）。方法：
   - `generateToken(Long userId, Boolean isAdmin)` → 返回 JWT 字符串，claims 包含 userId 和 isAdmin
   - `parseToken(String token)` → 返回 Claims 对象
   - `getUserId(String token)` → Long
   - `getIsAdmin(String token)` → Boolean
   - 使用 io.jsonwebtoken (JJWT 0.12.x API)，签名算法 HS256，secret 用 Keys.hmacShaKeyFor(Decoders.BASE64.decode(secret))
6. `JwtAuthenticationFilter` — extends OncePerRequestFilter，从 Authorization: Bearer <token> 解析 JWT，成功则创建 UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken 设到 SecurityContextHolder。白名单路径（/api/auth/**）直接放行不解析。token 无效/过期则不设认证信息，让后续 Security 返回 401。
7. `SecurityConfig` — @Configuration @EnableWebSecurity，配置：
   - csrf disabled
   - sessionManagement STATELESS
   - authorizeHttpRequests: /api/auth/** permitAll, /api/admin/** 需要 ROLE_ADMIN, 其余 /api/** authenticated
   - 注册 JwtAuthenticationFilter 在 UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter 之前
   - 异常处理：authenticationEntryPoint 返回 JSON 401，accessDeniedHandler 返回 JSON 403
8. `MyBatisPlusConfig` — @Configuration，@Bean MybatisPlusInterceptor 注册 PaginationInnerInterceptor(DbType.MYSQL)
9. `CorsConfig` — @Configuration implements WebMvcConfigurer，从 application.yml 读 cors.allowed-origins（@Value），addCorsMappings 配置 /api/** 允许 GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/OPTIONS，允许 Authorization 和 Content-Type header，allowCredentials true

---

**Status:** DONE

**What was implemented (9 files):**

1. **`dto/Result.java`** -- 统一返回体，泛型 `<T>`，静态方法 `ok(data)`, `ok()`, `fail(ErrorCode)`, `fail(int, String)`
2. **`exception/ErrorCode.java`** -- 错误码枚举，包含 SUCCESS/BAD_REQUEST/UNAUTHORIZED 等 13 个枚举值
3. **`exception/BizException.java`** -- 业务异常，RuntimeException 子类，持有 ErrorCode
4. **`exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java`** -- @RestControllerAdvice，处理 BizException、MethodArgumentNotValidException、Exception 三类异常
5. **`util/JwtUtil.java`** -- @Component，使用 JJWT 0.12.x API，从 `@Value` 读取 secret/expiration，支持 generateToken/parseToken/getUserId/getIsAdmin
6. **`config/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java`** -- extends OncePerRequestFilter，白名单 `/api/auth/**` 放行，解析 Bearer token 设置 SecurityContext，token 无效不设认证信息
7. **`config/SecurityConfig.java`** -- csrf disabled, STATELESS session, `/api/auth/**` permitAll, `/api/admin/**` 需 ROLE_ADMIN, 其余 `/api/**` authenticated，自定义 401/403 JSON 响应
8. **`config/MyBatisPlusConfig.java`** -- 注册 PaginationInnerInterceptor(DbType.MYSQL)
9. **`config/CorsConfig.java`** -- 从 yml 读 `cors.allowed-origins`，配置 `/api/**` 的跨域规则

- `util/JwtUtil.java`

**No issues or concerns.** All implementations follow the task spec exactly, use Lombok where appropriate, and are consistent with the existing project conventions (Spring Boot 3.2.5, JJWT 0.12.x, MyBatis-Plus 3.5.6).

## Task Description

- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/Result.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/exception/ErrorCode.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/exception/BizException.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/util/JwtUtil.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/SecurityConfig.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/MyBatisPlusConfig.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/config/CorsConfig.java`

**Steps:**
1. `Result<T>` — 统一返回体，字段：code(int), message(String), data(T)。静态方法 `ok(data)`, `ok()`, `fail(ErrorCode)`, `fail(int code, String message)`
2. `ErrorCode` — 错误码枚举，每个枚举值有 code(int) 和 message(String)。包含：
   - SUCCESS(200, "操作成功")
   - BAD_REQUEST(400, "请求参数错误")
   - UNAUTHORIZED(401, "未登录或登录已过期")
   - FORBIDDEN(403, "无权限访问")
   - NOT_FOUND(404, "资源不存在")
   - INTERNAL_ERROR(500, "系统内部错误")
   - EXAM_NOT_DRAFT(1001, "试卷非草稿状态，不可操作")
   - EXAM_NOT_PUBLISHED(1002, "试卷未发布")
   - EXAM_NO_QUESTIONS(1003, "试卷没有题目，不可发布")
   - MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED(1004, "已达最大考试次数")
   - EXAM_IN_PROGRESS(1005, "存在进行中的考试")
   - RECORD_NOT_FOUND(1006, "考试记录不存在")
   - RECORD_ALREADY_SUBMITTED(1007, "考试已提交")
3. `BizException` — RuntimeException 子类，持有 ErrorCode 字段，构造方法接收 ErrorCode
4. `GlobalExceptionHandler` — @RestControllerAdvice，处理：
   - BizException → 返回 Result.fail(bizException.getErrorCode())
   - MethodArgumentNotValidException → 返回 Result.fail(400, 第一个校验错误信息)
   - Exception → 返回 Result.fail(ErrorCode.INTERNAL_ERROR)，log.error 记录异常
5. `JwtUtil` — @Component，从 application.yml 读取 jwt.secret 和 jwt.expiration（用 @Value）。方法：
   - `generateToken(Long userId, Boolean isAdmin)` → 返回 JWT 字符串，claims 包含 userId 和 isAdmin
   - `parseToken(String token)` → 返回 Claims 对象
   - `getUserId(String token)` → Long
   - `getIsAdmin(String token)` → Boolean
   - 使用 io.jsonwebtoken (JJWT 0.12.x API)，签名算法 HS256，secret 用 Keys.hmacShaKeyFor(Decoders.BASE64.decode(secret))
6. `JwtAuthenticationFilter` — extends OncePerRequestFilter，从 Authorization: Bearer <token> 解析 JWT，成功则创建 UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken 设到 SecurityContextHolder。白名单路径（/api/auth/**）直接放行不解析。token 无效/过期则不设认证信息，让后续 Security 返回 401。
7. `SecurityConfig` — @Configuration @EnableWebSecurity，配置：
   - csrf disabled
   - sessionManagement STATELESS
   - authorizeHttpRequests: /api/auth/** permitAll, /api/admin/** 需要 ROLE_ADMIN, 其余 /api/** authenticated
   - 注册 JwtAuthenticationFilter 在 UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter 之前
   - 异常处理：authenticationEntryPoint 返回 JSON 401，accessDeniedHandler 返回 JSON 403
8. `MyBatisPlusConfig` — @Configuration，@Bean MybatisPlusInterceptor 注册 PaginationInnerInterceptor(DbType.MYSQL)
9. `CorsConfig` — @Configuration implements WebMvcConfigurer，从 application.yml 读 cors.allowed-origins（@Value），addCorsMappings 配置 /api/** 允许 GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/OPTIONS，允许 Authorization 和 Content-Type header，allowCredentials true

## Existing Code Context

application.yml has these custom configs:
```yaml
jwt:
  secret: ${JWT_SECRET:YmFzZTY0LWVuY29kZWQtc2VjcmV0LWtleS1mb3ItZXhhbS1zeXN0ZW0tand0}
  expiration: ${JWT_EXPIRATION:86400000}
cors:
  allowed-origins: ${CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS:http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:3000}
```

## Context

Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/
All files under exam-system/ subdirectory.
Use Lombok (@Data, @Getter, @Slf4j etc.) where appropriate.
NOT a git repo - skip commits.
Package: com.exam

## Report Format

When done, report:
- **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- What you implemented
- Files changed
- Any issues or concerns
