- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/service/QuestionService.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/controller/admin/AdminQuestionController.java`

## Existing Code Context

**QuestionBankMapper** (already exists at com.exam.mapper.QuestionBankMapper):
- extends BaseMapper<QuestionBank>

**QuestionBank entity** (com.exam.entity.QuestionBank):
- id(Long), examId(Long), content(String), optionA(String), optionB(String), optionC(String), optionD(String), correctAnswer(String), analysis(String), sortOrder(Integer), createdAt(LocalDateTime)
- @TableName("question_bank")

**ExamMapper** (com.exam.mapper.ExamMapper): extends BaseMapper<Exam>

**Exam entity**: id, title, status(ExamStatus), ...

**ExamStatus**: DRAFT, PUBLISHED, CLOSED

**ErrorCode**: EXAM_NOT_DRAFT(1001, "试卷非草稿状态，不可操作"), NOT_FOUND(404, ...)

**Result<T>**: ok(data), ok(), fail(ErrorCode)

**BizException**: new BizException(ErrorCode)

## Detailed Requirements

### 1. QuestionCreateRequest (@Data)
- content: @NotBlank String
- optionA: @NotBlank String
- optionB: @NotBlank String
- optionC: @NotBlank String
- optionD: @NotBlank String
- correctAnswer: @NotBlank @Pattern(regexp = "[ABCD]", message = "正确答案必须是A/B/C/D") String
- analysis: String (nullable)

### 2. QuestionItem (@Data) — 批量导入中的单个题目，字段同上

### 3. QuestionBatchRequest (@Data)
- questions: @NotEmpty @Valid List<QuestionItem>

### 4. QuestionService (@Service @Slf4j)
Inject: QuestionBankMapper, ExamMapper

Methods:
- `List<QuestionBank> list(Long examId)` — LambdaQueryWrapper eq examId, orderByAsc sortOrder
- `QuestionBank create(Long examId, QuestionCreateRequest req)` — checkExamDraft(examId), build QuestionBank from req, set sortOrder = current max + 1 (query max sortOrder for examId), insert, return
- `int batchCreate(Long examId, QuestionBatchRequest req)` — @Transactional, checkExamDraft(examId), get current max sortOrder, loop through req.questions to build QuestionBank list with incrementing sortOrder, saveBatch (or insert in loop), return count. Log: "[question] batch import examId={}, count={}"
- `void update(Long questionId, QuestionCreateRequest req)` — find question or throw NOT_FOUND, checkExamDraft(question.examId), update fields, updateById
- `void delete(Long questionId)` — find question or throw NOT_FOUND, checkExamDraft(question.examId), deleteById

Private helper:
- `void checkExamDraft(Long examId)` — query exam, if status != DRAFT throw EXAM_NOT_DRAFT
- `int getMaxSortOrder(Long examId)` — query max sort_order for examId, return 0 if null

### 5. AdminQuestionController (@RestController @Slf4j)
- @RequestMapping("/api/admin")

Endpoints:
- `GET /exams/{examId}/questions` → Result.ok(questionService.list(examId))
- `POST /exams/{examId}/questions` → Result.ok(questionService.create(examId, req)) with @Valid
- `POST /exams/{examId}/questions/batch` → Result.ok(questionService.batchCreate(examId, req)) with @Valid — **This is the Skill batch import endpoint**
- `PUT /questions/{id}` → questionService.update(id, req), Result.ok()
- `DELETE /questions/{id}` → questionService.delete(id), Result.ok()

You are implementing Task 10: 白名单管理

## Task Description

**Files to Create:**
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/mapper/ExamWhitelistMapper.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/WhitelistAddRequest.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/WhitelistRemoveRequest.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/service/WhitelistService.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/controller/admin/AdminWhitelistController.java`

## Existing Code

**ExamWhitelist entity** (com.exam.entity.ExamWhitelist):
- id(Long), examId(Long), userId(Long), createdAt(LocalDateTime)
- @TableName("exam_whitelist")

**SysUser entity** (com.exam.entity.SysUser):
- id(Long), oaUserId(String), username(String), displayName(String), isAdmin(Boolean), createdAt, updatedAt

**SysUserMapper** (com.exam.mapper.SysUserMapper): extends BaseMapper<SysUser>

**Result<T>**, **BizException**, **ErrorCode** — same as before

## Detailed Requirements

### 1. ExamWhitelistMapper
```java
@Mapper
public interface ExamWhitelistMapper extends BaseMapper<ExamWhitelist> {
}
```

### 2. DTOs
- **WhitelistAddRequest** (@Data): userIds(@NotEmpty List<Long>)
- **WhitelistRemoveRequest** (@Data): userIds(@NotEmpty List<Long>)

### 3. WhitelistService (@Service @Slf4j)
Inject: ExamWhitelistMapper, SysUserMapper

Methods:
- `List<UserInfo> list(Long examId)` — query ExamWhitelist by examId, get userIds, batch query SysUser by ids, map to UserInfo DTOs. Return empty list if no whitelist entries.
  - UserInfo is already at com.exam.dto.UserInfo with fields: id, oaUserId, username, displayName, isAdmin
- `int batchAdd(Long examId, List<Long> userIds)` — for each userId, check if already exists in whitelist (examId+userId), skip if exists, insert if not. Return number of actually added. Log: "[whitelist] examId={}, added={} users"
- `int batchRemove(Long examId, List<Long> userIds)` — delete from exam_whitelist where exam_id=examId and user_id in userIds. Return deleted count. Log: "[whitelist] examId={}, removed={} users"

### 4. AdminWhitelistController (@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/admin/exams/{examId}/whitelist"))
- `GET /` → Result.ok(whitelistService.list(examId))
- `POST /` → Result.ok(whitelistService.batchAdd(examId, req.getUserIds())) with @Valid
- `DELETE /` → Result.ok(whitelistService.batchRemove(examId, req.getUserIds())) with @Valid @RequestBody

## Context

Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/
All files under exam-system/ subdirectory.
Package: com.exam
NOT a git repo - skip commits.

## Report Format

When done, report:
- **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- What you implemented
- Files changed

input.prompt:
You are implementing Task 11: 考生端核心（开始考试 + 抽题 + 提交 + 评分）

## Task Description

**Files to Create:**
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/mapper/ExamRecordMapper.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/mapper/ExamRecordQuestionMapper.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/mapper/AnswerDetailMapper.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ExamDetailResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ExamStartResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ExamSubmitRequest.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/AnswerItem.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ExamSubmitResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/RecordDetailResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/service/ExamRecordService.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/controller/ExamController.java`

## Existing Code

**Entities:**
- Exam: id, title, status(ExamStatus), timeLimitMin, showAnswer, showAnalysis, questionCount, maxAttempts, accessMode(AccessMode), createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
- ExamRecord: id, examId, userId, score(BigDecimal), startTime(LocalDateTime), endTime(LocalDateTime), status(RecordStatus), attemptNo(Integer), createdAt
- ExamRecordQuestion: id, recordId, questionId, sortOrder
- AnswerDetail: id, recordId, questionId, userAnswer(String), isCorrect(Boolean), createdAt
- QuestionBank: id, examId, content, optionA~D, correctAnswer, analysis, sortOrder, createdAt
- ExamWhitelist: id, examId, userId, createdAt

**Enums:**
- ExamStatus: DRAFT, PUBLISHED, CLOSED
- AccessMode: OPEN, WHITELIST
- RecordStatus: IN_PROGRESS("in_progress"), SUBMITTED("submitted"), TIMEOUT("timeout")

**Mappers already exist:** ExamMapper, QuestionBankMapper, ExamWhitelistMapper, SysUserMapper

**ErrorCode:** EXAM_NOT_PUBLISHED(1002), MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED(1004), EXAM_IN_PROGRESS(1005), RECORD_NOT_FOUND(1006), RECORD_ALREADY_SUBMITTED(1007), NOT_FOUND(404), FORBIDDEN(403)

**SecurityContext:** Long.parseLong(SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication().getName())

## Detailed Requirements

### 1. Three Mappers — BaseMapper extensions
```java
@Mapper public interface ExamRecordMapper extends BaseMapper<ExamRecord> {}
@Mapper public interface ExamRecordQuestionMapper extends BaseMapper<ExamRecordQuestion> {}
@Mapper public interface AnswerDetailMapper extends BaseMapper<AnswerDetail> {}
```

### 2. DTOs

**ExamDetailResponse** (@Data):
- id, title, status(String), timeLimitMin, questionCount, maxAttempts, showAnswer, showAnalysis, accessMode(String)
- remainingAttempts (Integer, null = unlimited)

**ExamStartResponse** (@Data):
- recordId (Long)
- questions: List<QuestionVO> — inner static class QuestionVO with: id, content, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, sortOrder (NO correctAnswer, NO analysis)

**ExamSubmitRequest** (@Data):
- recordId: @NotNull Long
- answers: @NotEmpty List<@Valid AnswerItem>

**AnswerItem** (@Data):
- questionId: @NotNull Long
- answer: @NotBlank @Pattern(regexp="[ABCD]") String

**ExamSubmitResponse** (@Data):
- score (BigDecimal)
- status (String)

**RecordDetailResponse** (@Data):
- id, examId, examTitle(String), score, startTime, endTime, status(String), attemptNo
- answers: List<AnswerDetailVO>
- Inner static class AnswerDetailVO: questionId, content, optionA~D, userAnswer, isCorrect, correctAnswer(String, nullable), analysis(String, nullable)

### 3. ExamRecordService (@Service @Slf4j)
Inject all mappers: ExamMapper, ExamRecordMapper, ExamRecordQuestionMapper, AnswerDetailMapper, QuestionBankMapper, ExamWhitelistMapper

Methods:

**listExams(Long userId, int page, int size)** → IPage<ExamDetailResponse>
- Query all exams where status=PUBLISHED
- Filter by access: if accessMode=OPEN keep all; if WHITELIST, check ExamWhitelist for userId
- For each exam, compute remainingAttempts = maxAttempts==0 ? null : maxAttempts - completedCount
- Return as page (can use manual pagination or query-and-filter approach)
- Note: since we need to filter and compute, consider querying all published exams (should be small set), filter in memory, then paginate manually

**getExamDetail(Long examId, Long userId)** → ExamDetailResponse
- Find exam, check PUBLISHED
- Check user has access (OPEN or in whitelist)
- Compute remainingAttempts
- Return ExamDetailResponse

**startExam(Long examId, Long userId)** → ExamStartResponse — @Transactional
- Validate:
  1. Exam exists and status=PUBLISHED, else throw EXAM_NOT_PUBLISHED
  2. User has access (OPEN or whitelist), else throw FORBIDDEN
  3. maxAttempts > 0: count completed records (status IN submitted,timeout) for this user+exam, if >= maxAttempts throw MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED
  4. No IN_PROGRESS record exists for this user+exam, else throw EXAM_IN_PROGRESS
- Draw questions:
  - Get all questions for examId, ordered by sortOrder
  - If questionCount == 0 or questionCount >= totalQuestions: use all
  - Else: Collections.shuffle + subList(0, questionCount)
  - Shuffle the selected questions again for random order
- Create ExamRecord: examId, userId, startTime=now, status=IN_PROGRESS, attemptNo=completedCount+1
- Insert ExamRecord
- Insert ExamRecordQuestion for each drawn question (with sortOrder 1,2,3...)
- Build ExamStartResponse with recordId and question list (NO correctAnswer, NO analysis)
- Log: "[exam] userId={} started examId={}, recordId={}, questionCount={}"

**submitExam(ExamSubmitRequest req, Long userId)** → ExamSubmitResponse — @Transactional
- Find ExamRecord by recordId, validate:
  1. record.userId == userId, else throw FORBIDDEN
  2. record.status == IN_PROGRESS, else throw RECORD_ALREADY_SUBMITTED
- Get exam for time limit check
- Determine status:
  - If timeLimitMin > 0 and Duration.between(startTime, now).toMinutes() > timeLimitMin → status = TIMEOUT
  - Else → status = SUBMITTED
- Get drawn question IDs from ExamRecordQuestion for this recordId
- Get questions from QuestionBank for those IDs (Map<Long, QuestionBank>)
- Score calculation:
  - totalQuestions = drawn questions count
  - pointsPerQuestion = BigDecimal(100).divide(BigDecimal(totalQuestions), 2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP)
  - correctCount = 0
  - For each AnswerItem in req.answers:
    - Find question from map
    - isCorrect = answer.equals(question.correctAnswer)
    - if isCorrect: correctCount++
    - Insert AnswerDetail: recordId, questionId, userAnswer, isCorrect
  - score = pointsPerQuestion * correctCount (use BigDecimal multiply)
- Update ExamRecord: score, endTime=now, status
- Log: "[exam] userId={} submitted recordId={}, score={}, status={}"
- Return ExamSubmitResponse(score, status.getValue())

**listRecords(Long userId, int page, int size)** → IPage<RecordDetailResponse>
- Query ExamRecord where userId=userId, order by createdAt desc, paginate
- For each record, get exam title from ExamMapper
- Map to RecordDetailResponse (without answers list — just summary)

**getRecordDetail(Long recordId, Long userId)** → RecordDetailResponse
- Find ExamRecord, validate userId matches
- Find Exam for showAnswer/showAnalysis flags
- Get AnswerDetails for recordId
- Get Questions for those questionIds
- Build AnswerDetailVO list:
  - Always include: questionId, content, optionA~D, userAnswer, isCorrect
  - If showAnswer: include correctAnswer
  - If showAnalysis: include analysis
  - Otherwise set to null

### 4. ExamController (@RestController @RequestMapping("/api"))
Get userId from SecurityContext for all endpoints.

- `GET /exams` → listExams(userId, page, size)
- `GET /exams/{id}` → getExamDetail(id, userId)
- `POST /exams/{id}/start` → startExam(id, userId)
- `POST /exams/{id}/submit` → submitExam(req, userId) with @Valid
- `GET /records` → listRecords(userId, page, size)
- `GET /records/{id}` → getRecordDetail(id, userId)

## Context

Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/
All files under exam-system/ subdirectory.
Package: com.exam
NOT a git repo - skip commits.

## Report Format

When done, report:
- **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- What you implemented
- Files changed

data.prompt:
You are implementing Task 11: 考生端核心（开始考试 + 抽题 + 提交 + 评分）

## Task Description

**Files to Create:**
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/mapper/ExamRecordMapper.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/mapper/ExamRecordQuestionMapper.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/mapper/AnswerDetailMapper.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ExamDetailResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ExamStartResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ExamSubmitRequest.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/AnswerItem.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ExamSubmitResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/RecordDetailResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/service/ExamRecordService.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/controller/ExamController.java`

## Existing Code

**Entities:**
- Exam: id, title, status(ExamStatus), timeLimitMin, showAnswer, showAnalysis, questionCount, maxAttempts, accessMode(AccessMode), createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
- ExamRecord: id, examId, userId, score(BigDecimal), startTime(LocalDateTime), endTime(LocalDateTime), status(RecordStatus), attemptNo(Integer), createdAt
- ExamRecordQuestion: id, recordId, questionId, sortOrder
- AnswerDetail: id, recordId, questionId, userAnswer(String), isCorrect(Boolean), createdAt
- QuestionBank: id, examId, content, optionA~D, correctAnswer, analysis, sortOrder, createdAt
- ExamWhitelist: id, examId, userId, createdAt

**Enums:**
- ExamStatus: DRAFT, PUBLISHED, CLOSED
- AccessMode: OPEN, WHITELIST
- RecordStatus: IN_PROGRESS("in_progress"), SUBMITTED("submitted"), TIMEOUT("timeout")

**Mappers already exist:** ExamMapper, QuestionBankMapper, ExamWhitelistMapper, SysUserMapper

**ErrorCode:** EXAM_NOT_PUBLISHED(1002), MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED(1004), EXAM_IN_PROGRESS(1005), RECORD_NOT_FOUND(1006), RECORD_ALREADY_SUBMITTED(1007), NOT_FOUND(404), FORBIDDEN(403)

**SecurityContext:** Long.parseLong(SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication().getName())

## Detailed Requirements

### 1. Three Mappers — BaseMapper extensions
```java
@Mapper public interface ExamRecordMapper extends BaseMapper<ExamRecord> {}
@Mapper public interface ExamRecordQuestionMapper extends BaseMapper<ExamRecordQuestion> {}
@Mapper public interface AnswerDetailMapper extends BaseMapper<AnswerDetail> {}
```

### 2. DTOs

**ExamDetailResponse** (@Data):
- id, title, status(String), timeLimitMin, questionCount, maxAttempts, showAnswer, showAnalysis, accessMode(String)
- remainingAttempts (Integer, null = unlimited)

**ExamStartResponse** (@Data):
- recordId (Long)
- questions: List<QuestionVO> — inner static class QuestionVO with: id, content, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, sortOrder (NO correctAnswer, NO analysis)

**ExamSubmitRequest** (@Data):
- recordId: @NotNull Long
- answers: @NotEmpty List<@Valid AnswerItem>

**AnswerItem** (@Data):
- questionId: @NotNull Long
- answer: @NotBlank @Pattern(regexp="[ABCD]") String

**ExamSubmitResponse** (@Data):
- score (BigDecimal)
- status (String)

**RecordDetailResponse** (@Data):
- id, examId, examTitle(String), score, startTime, endTime, status(String), attemptNo
- answers: List<AnswerDetailVO>
- Inner static class AnswerDetailVO: questionId, content, optionA~D, userAnswer, isCorrect, correctAnswer(String, nullable), analysis(String, nullable)

### 3. ExamRecordService (@Service @Slf4j)
Inject all mappers: ExamMapper, ExamRecordMapper, ExamRecordQuestionMapper, AnswerDetailMapper, QuestionBankMapper, ExamWhitelistMapper

Methods:

**listExams(Long userId, int page, int size)** → IPage<ExamDetailResponse>
- Query all exams where status=PUBLISHED
- Filter by access: if accessMode=OPEN keep all; if WHITELIST, check ExamWhitelist for userId
- For each exam, compute remainingAttempts = maxAttempts==0 ? null : maxAttempts - completedCount
- Return as page (can use manual pagination or query-and-filter approach)
- Note: since we need to filter and compute, consider querying all published exams (should be small set), filter in memory, then paginate manually

**getExamDetail(Long examId, Long userId)** → ExamDetailResponse
- Find exam, check PUBLISHED
- Check user has access (OPEN or in whitelist)
- Compute remainingAttempts
- Return ExamDetailResponse

**startExam(Long examId, Long userId)** → ExamStartResponse — @Transactional
- Validate:
  1. Exam exists and status=PUBLISHED, else throw EXAM_NOT_PUBLISHED
  2. User has access (OPEN or whitelist), else throw FORBIDDEN
  3. maxAttempts > 0: count completed records (status IN submitted,timeout) for this user+exam, if >= maxAttempts throw MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED
  4. No IN_PROGRESS record exists for this user+exam, else throw EXAM_IN_PROGRESS
- Draw questions:
  - Get all questions for examId, ordered by sortOrder
  - If questionCount == 0 or questionCount >= totalQuestions: use all
  - Else: Collections.shuffle + subList(0, questionCount)
  - Shuffle the selected questions again for random order
- Create ExamRecord: examId, userId, startTime=now, status=IN_PROGRESS, attemptNo=completedCount+1
- Insert ExamRecord
- Insert ExamRecordQuestion for each drawn question (with sortOrder 1,2,3...)
- Build ExamStartResponse with recordId and question list (NO correctAnswer, NO analysis)
- Log: "[exam] userId={} started examId={}, recordId={}, questionCount={}"

**submitExam(ExamSubmitRequest req, Long userId)** → ExamSubmitResponse — @Transactional
- Find ExamRecord by recordId, validate:
  1. record.userId == userId, else throw FORBIDDEN
  2. record.status == IN_PROGRESS, else throw RECORD_ALREADY_SUBMITTED
- Get exam for time limit check
- Determine status:
  - If timeLimitMin > 0 and Duration.between(startTime, now).toMinutes() > timeLimitMin → status = TIMEOUT
  - Else → status = SUBMITTED
- Get drawn question IDs from ExamRecordQuestion for this recordId
- Get questions from QuestionBank for those IDs (Map<Long, QuestionBank>)
- Score calculation:
  - totalQuestions = drawn questions count
  - pointsPerQuestion = BigDecimal(100).divide(BigDecimal(totalQuestions), 2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP)
  - correctCount = 0
  - For each AnswerItem in req.answers:
    - Find question from map
    - isCorrect = answer.equals(question.correctAnswer)
    - if isCorrect: correctCount++
    - Insert AnswerDetail: recordId, questionId, userAnswer, isCorrect
  - score = pointsPerQuestion * correctCount (use BigDecimal multiply)
- Update ExamRecord: score, endTime=now, status
- Log: "[exam] userId={} submitted recordId={}, score={}, status={}"
- Return ExamSubmitResponse(score, status.getValue())

**listRecords(Long userId, int page, int size)** → IPage<RecordDetailResponse>
- Query ExamRecord where userId=userId, order by createdAt desc, paginate
- For each record, get exam title from ExamMapper
- Map to RecordDetailResponse (without answers list — just summary)

**getRecordDetail(Long recordId, Long userId)** → RecordDetailResponse
- Find ExamRecord, validate userId matches
- Find Exam for showAnswer/showAnalysis flags
- Get AnswerDetails for recordId
- Get Questions for those questionIds
- Build AnswerDetailVO list:
  - Always include: questionId, content, optionA~D, userAnswer, isCorrect
  - If showAnswer: include correctAnswer
  - If showAnalysis: include analysis
  - Otherwise set to null

### 4. ExamController (@RestController @RequestMapping("/api"))
Get userId from SecurityContext for all endpoints.

- `GET /exams` → listExams(userId, page, size)
- `GET /exams/{id}` → getExamDetail(id, userId)
- `POST /exams/{id}/start` → startExam(id, userId)
- `POST /exams/{id}/submit` → submitExam(req, userId) with @Valid
- `GET /records` → listRecords(userId, page, size)
- `GET /records/{id}` → getRecordDetail(id, userId)

4. `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ExamDetailResponse.java` -- Exam detail with remainingAttempts

8. `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ExamSubmitResponse.java` -- Score + status response
9. `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/RecordDetailResponse.java` -- Record detail with AnswerDetailVO (conditional correctAnswer/analysis)
10. `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/service/ExamRecordService.java` -- Core service with 6 methods: listExams, getExamDetail, startExam, submitExam, listRecords, getRecordDetail
11. `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/controller/ExamController.java` -- 6 REST endpoints under /api

**File modified (1):**

12. `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/pom.xml` -- Added `spring-boot-starter-validation` dependency (was missing, caused compile errors for `@Valid`/`@NotNull` across multiple existing files too)

**Key implementation details:**
- Access control: OPEN mode allows all users; WHITELIST mode checks `exam_whitelist` table
- Question drawing: shuffle + subList for random selection, re-shuffle for random order
- Scoring: 100 points / total questions per question, BigDecimal with HALF_UP rounding
- Timeout detection: compares Duration between startTime and now against timeLimitMin
- showAnswer/showAnalysis flags control whether correctAnswer and analysis are returned in record detail
- All validation per requirements: published status, access check, max attempts, in-progress check
- Batch query for exam titles in listRecords to avoid N+1

- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/RecordDetailResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/service/ExamRecordService.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/controller/ExamController.java`

## Existing Code

**Entities:**
- Exam: id, title, status(ExamStatus), timeLimitMin, showAnswer, showAnalysis, questionCount, maxAttempts, accessMode(AccessMode), createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
- ExamRecord: id, examId, userId, score(BigDecimal), startTime(LocalDateTime), endTime(LocalDateTime), status(RecordStatus), attemptNo(Integer), createdAt
- ExamRecordQuestion: id, recordId, questionId, sortOrder
- AnswerDetail: id, recordId, questionId, userAnswer(String), isCorrect(Boolean), createdAt
- QuestionBank: id, examId, content, optionA~D, correctAnswer, analysis, sortOrder, createdAt
- ExamWhitelist: id, examId, userId, createdAt

**Enums:**
- ExamStatus: DRAFT, PUBLISHED, CLOSED
- AccessMode: OPEN, WHITELIST
- RecordStatus: IN_PROGRESS("in_progress"), SUBMITTED("submitted"), TIMEOUT("timeout")

**Mappers already exist:** ExamMapper, QuestionBankMapper, ExamWhitelistMapper, SysUserMapper

**ErrorCode:** EXAM_NOT_PUBLISHED(1002), MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED(1004), EXAM_IN_PROGRESS(1005), RECORD_NOT_FOUND(1006), RECORD_ALREADY_SUBMITTED(1007), NOT_FOUND(404), FORBIDDEN(403)

**SecurityContext:** Long.parseLong(SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication().getName())

## Detailed Requirements

### 1. Three Mappers — BaseMapper extensions
```java
@Mapper public interface ExamRecordMapper extends BaseMapper<ExamRecord> {}
@Mapper public interface ExamRecordQuestionMapper extends BaseMapper<ExamRecordQuestion> {}
@Mapper public interface AnswerDetailMapper extends BaseMapper<AnswerDetail> {}
```

### 2. DTOs

**ExamDetailResponse** (@Data):
- id, title, status(String), timeLimitMin, questionCount, maxAttempts, showAnswer, showAnalysis, accessMode(String)
- remainingAttempts (Integer, null = unlimited)

**ExamStartResponse** (@Data):
- recordId (Long)
- questions: List<QuestionVO> — inner static class QuestionVO with: id, content, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, sortOrder (NO correctAnswer, NO analysis)

**ExamSubmitRequest** (@Data):
- recordId: @NotNull Long
- answers: @NotEmpty List<@Valid AnswerItem>

**AnswerItem** (@Data):
- questionId: @NotNull Long
- answer: @NotBlank @Pattern(regexp="[ABCD]") String

**ExamSubmitResponse** (@Data):
- score (BigDecimal)
- status (String)

**RecordDetailResponse** (@Data):
- id, examId, examTitle(String), score, startTime, endTime, status(String), attemptNo
- answers: List<AnswerDetailVO>
- Inner static class AnswerDetailVO: questionId, content, optionA~D, userAnswer, isCorrect, correctAnswer(String, nullable), analysis(String, nullable)

### 3. ExamRecordService (@Service @Slf4j)
Inject all mappers: ExamMapper, ExamRecordMapper, ExamRecordQuestionMapper, AnswerDetailMapper, QuestionBankMapper, ExamWhitelistMapper

Methods:

**listExams(Long userId, int page, int size)** → IPage<ExamDetailResponse>
- Query all exams where status=PUBLISHED
- Filter by access: if accessMode=OPEN keep all; if WHITELIST, check ExamWhitelist for userId
- For each exam, compute remainingAttempts = maxAttempts==0 ? null : maxAttempts - completedCount
- Return as page (can use manual pagination or query-and-filter approach)
- Note: since we need to filter and compute, consider querying all published exams (should be small set), filter in memory, then paginate manually

**getExamDetail(Long examId, Long userId)** → ExamDetailResponse
- Find exam, check PUBLISHED
- Check user has access (OPEN or in whitelist)
- Compute remainingAttempts
- Return ExamDetailResponse

**startExam(Long examId, Long userId)** → ExamStartResponse — @Transactional
- Validate:
  1. Exam exists and status=PUBLISHED, else throw EXAM_NOT_PUBLISHED
  2. User has access (OPEN or whitelist), else throw FORBIDDEN
  3. maxAttempts > 0: count completed records (status IN submitted,timeout) for this user+exam, if >= maxAttempts throw MAX_ATTEMPTS_REACHED
  4. No IN_PROGRESS record exists for this user+exam, else throw EXAM_IN_PROGRESS
- Draw questions:
  - Get all questions for examId, ordered by sortOrder
  - If questionCount == 0 or questionCount >= totalQuestions: use all
  - Else: Collections.shuffle + subList(0, questionCount)
  - Shuffle the selected questions again for random order
- Create ExamRecord: examId, userId, startTime=now, status=IN_PROGRESS, attemptNo=completedCount+1
- Insert ExamRecord
- Insert ExamRecordQuestion for each drawn question (with sortOrder 1,2,3...)
- Build ExamStartResponse with recordId and question list (NO correctAnswer, NO analysis)
- Log: "[exam] userId={} started examId={}, recordId={}, questionCount={}"

**submitExam(ExamSubmitRequest req, Long userId)** → ExamSubmitResponse — @Transactional
- Find ExamRecord by recordId, validate:
  1. record.userId == userId, else throw FORBIDDEN
  2. record.status == IN_PROGRESS, else throw RECORD_ALREADY_SUBMITTED
- Get exam for time limit check
- Determine status:
  - If timeLimitMin > 0 and Duration.between(startTime, now).toMinutes() > timeLimitMin → status = TIMEOUT
  - Else → status = SUBMITTED
- Get drawn question IDs from ExamRecordQuestion for this recordId
- Get questions from QuestionBank for those IDs (Map<Long, QuestionBank>)
- Score calculation:
  - totalQuestions = drawn questions count
  - pointsPerQuestion = BigDecimal(100).divide(BigDecimal(totalQuestions), 2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP)
  - correctCount = 0
  - For each AnswerItem in req.answers:
    - Find question from map
    - isCorrect = answer.equals(question.correctAnswer)
    - if isCorrect: correctCount++
    - Insert AnswerDetail: recordId, questionId, userAnswer, isCorrect
  - score = pointsPerQuestion * correctCount (use BigDecimal multiply)
- Update ExamRecord: score, endTime=now, status
- Log: "[exam] userId={} submitted recordId={}, score={}, status={}"
- Return ExamSubmitResponse(score, status.getValue())

**listRecords(Long userId, int page, int size)** → IPage<RecordDetailResponse>
- Query ExamRecord where userId=userId, order by createdAt desc, paginate
- For each record, get exam title from ExamMapper
- Map to RecordDetailResponse (without answers list — just summary)

**getRecordDetail(Long recordId, Long userId)** → RecordDetailResponse
- Find ExamRecord, validate userId matches
- Find Exam for showAnswer/showAnalysis flags
- Get AnswerDetails for recordId
- Get Questions for those questionIds
- Build AnswerDetailVO list:
  - Always include: questionId, content, optionA~D, userAnswer, isCorrect
  - If showAnswer: include correctAnswer
  - If showAnalysis: include analysis
  - Otherwise set to null

### 4. ExamController (@RestController @RequestMapping("/api"))
Get userId from SecurityContext for all endpoints.

- `GET /exams` → listExams(userId, page, size)
- `GET /exams/{id}` → getExamDetail(id, userId)
- `POST /exams/{id}/start` → startExam(id, userId)
- `POST /exams/{id}/submit` → submitExam(req, userId) with @Valid
- `GET /records` → listRecords(userId, page, size)
- `GET /records/{id}` → getRecordDetail(id, userId)

## Context

All files under exam-system/ subdirectory.
Package: com.exam
NOT a git repo - skip commits.

- **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- What you implemented

8. `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ExamSubmitResponse.java` -- Score + status response
9. `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/RecordDetailResponse.java` -- Record detail with AnswerDetailVO (conditional correctAnswer/analysis)
10. `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/service/ExamRecordService.java` -- Core service with 6 methods: listExams, getExamDetail, startExam, submitExam, listRecords, getRecordDetail

**File modified (1):**

12. `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/pom.xml` -- Added `spring-boot-starter-validation` dependency (was missing, caused compile errors for `@Valid`/`@NotNull` across multiple existing files too)

**Key implementation details:**
- Access control: OPEN mode allows all users; WHITELIST mode checks `exam_whitelist` table
- Question drawing: shuffle + subList for random selection, re-shuffle for random order
- Scoring: 100 points / total questions per question, BigDecimal with HALF_UP rounding
- Timeout detection: compares Duration between startTime and now against timeLimitMin
- showAnswer/showAnalysis flags control whether correctAnswer and analysis are returned in record detail
- All validation per requirements: published status, access check, max attempts, in-progress check
- Batch query for exam titles in listRecords to avoid N+1

You are implementing Task 12: 试卷分析接口

## Task Description

**Files to Create:**
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ScoreAnalysisResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/QuestionAnalysisResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/mapper/AnalysisMapper.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/resources/mapper/AnalysisMapper.xml`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/service/AnalysisService.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/controller/admin/AdminAnalysisController.java`

## Existing Code

All mappers, entities, enums, Result<T>, BizException exist.

## Detailed Requirements

### 1. ScoreAnalysisResponse (@Data)
- userId (Long)
- displayName (String)
- score (BigDecimal)
- startTime (LocalDateTime)
- endTime (LocalDateTime)
- attemptNo (Integer)

### 2. QuestionAnalysisResponse (@Data)
- questionId (Long)
- content (String)
- totalAnswered (Integer)
- correctCount (Integer)
- correctRate (Double) — percentage 0-100, computed in service not SQL

### 3. AnalysisMapper (@Mapper interface)
```java
@Mapper
public interface AnalysisMapper {
    IPage<ScoreAnalysisResponse> selectScoreAnalysis(IPage<?> page, @Param("examId") Long examId);
    List<QuestionAnalysisResponse> selectQuestionAnalysis(@Param("examId") Long examId);
}
```

### 4. AnalysisMapper.xml
Namespace: com.exam.mapper.AnalysisMapper

**selectScoreAnalysis:**
```sql
SELECT er.user_id, su.display_name, er.score, er.start_time, er.end_time, er.attempt_no
FROM exam_record er
JOIN sys_user su ON er.user_id = su.id
WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId}
  AND er.status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
ORDER BY er.score DESC, er.end_time ASC
```

**selectQuestionAnalysis:**
```sql
SELECT qb.id AS question_id, qb.content,
  COUNT(ad.id) AS total_answered,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ad.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correct_count
FROM question_bank qb
LEFT JOIN answer_detail ad ON qb.id = ad.question_id
  AND ad.record_id IN (
    SELECT id FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
  )
WHERE qb.exam_id = #{examId}
GROUP BY qb.id, qb.content, qb.sort_order
ORDER BY qb.sort_order
```

### 5. AnalysisService (@Service)
Inject: AnalysisMapper

- `IPage<ScoreAnalysisResponse> scoreAnalysis(Long examId, int page, int size)` — call mapper with Page
- `List<QuestionAnalysisResponse> questionAnalysis(Long examId)` — call mapper, then compute correctRate for each: if totalAnswered > 0 then correctRate = (correctCount * 100.0) / totalAnswered, round to 1 decimal; else 0.0

### 6. AdminAnalysisController (@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/admin/exams/{examId}/analysis"))
- `GET /scores` → Result.ok(analysisService.scoreAnalysis(examId, page, size))
- `GET /questions` → Result.ok(analysisService.questionAnalysis(examId))

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="com.exam.mapper.AnalysisMapper">

    <select id="selectScoreAnalysis" resultType="com.exam.dto.ScoreAnalysisResponse">
        SELECT er.user_id, su.display_name, er.score, er.start_time, er.end_time, er.attempt_no
        FROM exam_record er
        JOIN sys_user su ON er.user_id = su.id
        WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId}
          AND er.status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
        ORDER BY er.score DESC, er.end_time ASC
    </select>

    <select id="selectQuestionAnalysis" resultType="com.exam.dto.QuestionAnalysisResponse">
        SELECT qb.id AS question_id, qb.content,
            COUNT(ad.id) AS total_answered,
            SUM(CASE WHEN ad.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correct_count
        FROM question_bank qb
        LEFT JOIN answer_detail ad ON qb.id = ad.question_id
            AND ad.record_id IN (
                SELECT id FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
            )
        WHERE qb.exam_id = #{examId}
        GROUP BY qb.id, qb.content, qb.sort_order
        ORDER BY qb.sort_order
    </select>

</mapper>

toolUseResult.prompt:
You are implementing Task 12: 试卷分析接口

## Task Description

**Files to Create:**
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/ScoreAnalysisResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/dto/QuestionAnalysisResponse.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/mapper/AnalysisMapper.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/resources/mapper/AnalysisMapper.xml`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/service/AnalysisService.java`
- `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/controller/admin/AdminAnalysisController.java`

## Existing Code

All mappers, entities, enums, Result<T>, BizException exist.

## Detailed Requirements

### 1. ScoreAnalysisResponse (@Data)
- userId (Long)
- displayName (String)
- score (BigDecimal)
- startTime (LocalDateTime)
- endTime (LocalDateTime)
- attemptNo (Integer)

### 2. QuestionAnalysisResponse (@Data)
- questionId (Long)
- content (String)
- totalAnswered (Integer)
- correctCount (Integer)
- correctRate (Double) — percentage 0-100, computed in service not SQL

### 3. AnalysisMapper (@Mapper interface)
```java
@Mapper
public interface AnalysisMapper {
    IPage<ScoreAnalysisResponse> selectScoreAnalysis(IPage<?> page, @Param("examId") Long examId);
    List<QuestionAnalysisResponse> selectQuestionAnalysis(@Param("examId") Long examId);
}
```

### 4. AnalysisMapper.xml
Namespace: com.exam.mapper.AnalysisMapper

**selectScoreAnalysis:**
```sql
SELECT er.user_id, su.display_name, er.score, er.start_time, er.end_time, er.attempt_no
FROM exam_record er
JOIN sys_user su ON er.user_id = su.id
WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId}
  AND er.status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
ORDER BY er.score DESC, er.end_time ASC
```

**selectQuestionAnalysis:**
```sql
SELECT qb.id AS question_id, qb.content,
  COUNT(ad.id) AS total_answered,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ad.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correct_count
FROM question_bank qb
LEFT JOIN answer_detail ad ON qb.id = ad.question_id
  AND ad.record_id IN (
    SELECT id FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
  )
WHERE qb.exam_id = #{examId}
GROUP BY qb.id, qb.content, qb.sort_order
ORDER BY qb.sort_order
```

### 5. AnalysisService (@Service)
Inject: AnalysisMapper

- `IPage<ScoreAnalysisResponse> scoreAnalysis(Long examId, int page, int size)` — call mapper with Page
- `List<QuestionAnalysisResponse> questionAnalysis(Long examId)` — call mapper, then compute correctRate for each: if totalAnswered > 0 then correctRate = (correctCount * 100.0) / totalAnswered, round to 1 decimal; else 0.0

### 6. AdminAnalysisController (@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/admin/exams/{examId}/analysis"))
- `GET /scores` → Result.ok(analysisService.scoreAnalysis(examId, page, size))
- `GET /questions` → Result.ok(analysisService.questionAnalysis(examId))

## Context

Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/
All files under exam-system/ subdirectory.
Package: com.exam
NOT a git repo - skip commits.

## Report Format

When done, report:
- **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- What you implemented
- Files changed

## Task Description

Create all admin-side frontend pages, hooks, and UI components.

**Files to Create (all under exam-web/src/):**

**UI Components:**
- `components/ui/table.tsx`
- `components/ui/badge.tsx`
- `components/ui/tabs.tsx`
- `components/ui/select.tsx`
- `components/ui/radio-group.tsx`
- `components/ui/textarea.tsx`
- `components/ui/label.tsx`
- `components/ui/dialog.tsx`
- `components/ui/switch.tsx`

**Business Components:**
- `components/question-form.tsx`

**Hooks:**
- `hooks/use-admin-exams.ts`
- `hooks/use-admin-questions.ts`
- `hooks/use-admin-whitelist.ts`
- `hooks/use-admin-analysis.ts`

**Route Pages:**
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/index.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/create.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.edit.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.questions.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.whitelist.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.analysis.tsx`

## Existing Code Context

**lib/api.ts** exports: get<T>(url), post<T>(url, body), put<T>(url, body), del<T>(url, body)

**types/index.ts** has: User, Exam, Question, ExamRecord, AnswerDetail, PageResult<T>, ExamStatus, AccessMode, RecordStatus

**lib/utils.ts** has: cn()

**hooks/use-auth.ts** has: useAuth() → { user, isAdmin, isLoading }

**i18n:** useTranslation() available

**Existing UI:** button.tsx, input.tsx, separator.tsx

## Detailed Requirements

### UI Components (Radix UI + TailwindCSS + CVA pattern)

Create standard shadcn/ui-style components. Each should:
- Use the Radix UI primitive as base
- Apply TailwindCSS styling
- ForwardRef where needed
- Export named components

Key components:
- **table.tsx**: Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell — plain HTML table with Tailwind styling
- **badge.tsx**: CVA variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline)
- **tabs.tsx**: Radix Tabs (Root, List, Trigger, Content)
- **select.tsx**: Radix Select (Root, Trigger, Content, Item, Value)
- **radio-group.tsx**: Radix RadioGroup (Root, Item, Indicator)
- **textarea.tsx**: Standard textarea with Tailwind styling
- **label.tsx**: Radix Label
- **dialog.tsx**: Radix Dialog (Root, Trigger, Content, Header, Footer, Title, Description, Close)
- **switch.tsx**: Simple toggle switch (can use checkbox styled as switch, or a custom div)

### Hooks (TanStack Query)

**use-admin-exams.ts:**
```typescript
export function useAdminExamList(page: number, size: number)  // GET /api/admin/exams?page=&size=
export function useCreateExam()    // POST /api/admin/exams mutation, invalidates ['admin-exams']
export function useUpdateExam()    // PUT /api/admin/exams/{id} mutation
export function useDeleteExam()    // DELETE /api/admin/exams/{id} mutation
export function usePublishExam()   // PUT /api/admin/exams/{id}/publish mutation
export function useCloseExam()     // PUT /api/admin/exams/{id}/close mutation
```

**use-admin-questions.ts:**
```typescript
export function useQuestionList(examId: number)  // GET /api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions
export function useAddQuestion()     // POST mutation
export function useBatchImport()     // POST /batch mutation
export function useUpdateQuestion()  // PUT mutation
export function useDeleteQuestion()  // DELETE mutation
```

**use-admin-whitelist.ts:**
```typescript
export function useWhitelist(examId: number)     // GET
export function useAddWhitelist()    // POST mutation
export function useRemoveWhitelist() // DELETE mutation
```

**use-admin-analysis.ts:**
```typescript
export function useScoreAnalysis(examId: number, page: number, size: number)  // GET /scores
export function useQuestionAnalysis(examId: number)  // GET /questions
```

### question-form.tsx
Reusable form component for creating/editing questions.
Props: { defaultValues?: Partial<Question>, onSubmit: (data) => void, onCancel: () => void }
Fields: content (textarea), optionA-D (input), correctAnswer (radio-group A/B/C/D), analysis (textarea, optional)

### Route Pages

**admin/exams/index.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/')
- Table with columns: 名称, 状态(Badge), 答题人数, 创建时间
- Status badge colors: draft=secondary, published=default(green), closed=destructive
- Action buttons per row: 编辑(draft), 发布(draft), 关闭(published), 删除(draft), 题目管理, 白名单, 分析
- Top "创建试卷" button → navigate to /admin/exams/create
- Pagination (simple prev/next)

**admin/exams/create.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/create')
- Form: title(input), timeLimitMin(input number), questionCount(input number), showAnswer(switch), showAnalysis(switch), maxAttempts(input number), accessMode(select: open/whitelist)
- Submit → useCreateExam mutation → navigate to /admin/exams

**admin/exams/$id.edit.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/edit')
- Same form as create, but prefilled with exam data (fetch with GET /api/admin/exams — find from list or add a get endpoint)
- Actually, use the exam list data or just refetch. For simplicity, use the ExamService which we can call.
- Note: there's no dedicated GET /api/admin/exams/{id} endpoint in the API spec. Use the student endpoint GET /api/exams/{id} or add fetching from list. Best approach: just navigate with state or use queryClient cache.
- Simple approach: call GET /api/exams/{id} (student endpoint works for admin too since they're authenticated)
- Submit → useUpdateExam mutation → navigate back

**admin/exams/$id.questions.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/questions')
- Question list (useQuestionList)
- "添加题目" button → opens Dialog with question-form
- Each question row: sortOrder, content (truncated), correctAnswer, actions (edit/delete)
- Edit → Dialog with question-form prefilled
- Delete → confirm dialog

**admin/exams/$id.whitelist.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/whitelist')
- Input field + add button (enter user IDs comma-separated or one at a time)
- Whitelist user table: username, displayName, actions (remove)
- Bulk remove with checkboxes (optional, simple approach: individual remove buttons)

**admin/exams/$id.analysis.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/analysis')
- Tabs component with 2 tabs:
  - "得分情况": Table (displayName, score, startTime, endTime, attemptNo), pagination
  - "题目分析": List of questions, each showing: content (truncated), totalAnswered, correctCount, correctRate as percentage with a simple progress bar div

## Context

Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/
All files under exam-web/src/ subdirectory.
NOT a git repo - skip commits.
Use TypeScript, import from @/ alias.
Use useTranslation() for user-facing text where practical (at minimum nav items and buttons).

## Report Format

When done, report:
- **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- What you implemented
- Files changed

- **badge.tsx**: CVA variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline)
- **tabs.tsx**: Radix Tabs (Root, List, Trigger, Content)
- **select.tsx**: Radix Select (Root, Trigger, Content, Item, Value)
- **radio-group.tsx**: Radix RadioGroup (Root, Item, Indicator)
- **textarea.tsx**: Standard textarea with Tailwind styling
- **label.tsx**: Radix Label
- **dialog.tsx**: Radix Dialog (Root, Trigger, Content, Header, Footer, Title, Description, Close)
- **switch.tsx**: Simple toggle switch (can use checkbox styled as switch, or a custom div)

### Hooks (TanStack Query)

**use-admin-exams.ts:**
```typescript
export function useAdminExamList(page: number, size: number)  // GET /api/admin/exams?page=&size=
export function useCreateExam()    // POST /api/admin/exams mutation, invalidates ['admin-exams']
export function useUpdateExam()    // PUT /api/admin/exams/{id} mutation
export function useDeleteExam()    // DELETE /api/admin/exams/{id} mutation
export function usePublishExam()   // PUT /api/admin/exams/{id}/publish mutation
export function useCloseExam()     // PUT /api/admin/exams/{id}/close mutation
```

**use-admin-questions.ts:**
```typescript
export function useQuestionList(examId: number)  // GET /api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions
export function useAddQuestion()     // POST mutation
export function useBatchImport()     // POST /batch mutation
export function useUpdateQuestion()  // PUT mutation
export function useDeleteQuestion()  // DELETE mutation
```

**use-admin-whitelist.ts:**
```typescript
export function useWhitelist(examId: number)     // GET
export function useAddWhitelist()    // POST mutation
export function useRemoveWhitelist() // DELETE mutation
```

**use-admin-analysis.ts:**
```typescript
export function useScoreAnalysis(examId: number, page: number, size: number)  // GET /scores
export function useQuestionAnalysis(examId: number)  // GET /questions
```

### question-form.tsx
Reusable form component for creating/editing questions.
Props: { defaultValues?: Partial<Question>, onSubmit: (data) => void, onCancel: () => void }
Fields: content (textarea), optionA-D (input), correctAnswer (radio-group A/B/C/D), analysis (textarea, optional)

### Route Pages

**admin/exams/index.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/')
- Table with columns: 名称, 状态(Badge), 答题人数, 创建时间
- Status badge colors: draft=secondary, published=default(green), closed=destructive
- Action buttons per row: 编辑(draft), 发布(draft), 关闭(published), 删除(draft), 题目管理, 白名单, 分析
- Top "创建试卷" button → navigate to /admin/exams/create
- Pagination (simple prev/next)

**admin/exams/create.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/create')
- Form: title(input), timeLimitMin(input number), questionCount(input number), showAnswer(switch), showAnalysis(switch), maxAttempts(input number), accessMode(select: open/whitelist)
- Submit → useCreateExam mutation → navigate to /admin/exams

**admin/exams/$id.edit.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/edit')
- Same form as create, but prefilled with exam data (fetch with GET /api/admin/exams — find from list or add a get endpoint)
- Actually, use the exam list data or just refetch. For simplicity, use the ExamService which we can call.
- Note: there's no dedicated GET /api/admin/exams/{id} endpoint in the API spec. Use the student endpoint GET /api/exams/{id} or add fetching from list. Best approach: just navigate with state or use queryClient cache.
- Simple approach: call GET /api/exams/{id} (student endpoint works for admin too since they're authenticated)
- Submit → useUpdateExam mutation → navigate back

**admin/exams/$id.questions.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/questions')
- Question list (useQuestionList)
- "添加题目" button → opens Dialog with question-form
- Each question row: sortOrder, content (truncated), correctAnswer, actions (edit/delete)
- Edit → Dialog with question-form prefilled
- Delete → confirm dialog

**admin/exams/$id.whitelist.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/whitelist')
- Input field + add button (enter user IDs comma-separated or one at a time)
- Whitelist user table: username, displayName, actions (remove)
- Bulk remove with checkboxes (optional, simple approach: individual remove buttons)

**admin/exams/$id.analysis.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/analysis')
- Tabs component with 2 tabs:
  - "得分情况": Table (displayName, score, startTime, endTime, attemptNo), pagination
  - "题目分析": List of questions, each showing: content (truncated), totalAnswered, correctCount, correctRate as percentage with a simple progress bar div

    17→    isLoading,
    18→    isError,
    19→  }

     4→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
     5→
     6→const buttonVariants = cva(
     7→  "inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:size-4 [&_svg]:shrink-0",
     8→  {

    12→        destructive: "bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground shadow-sm hover:bg-destructive/90",
    13→        outline: "border border-input bg-background shadow-sm hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
    14→        secondary: "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground shadow-sm hover:bg-secondary/80",

    28→    },
    29→  },
    30→)
    31→

    33→  extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>,
    34→    VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> {
    35→  asChild?: boolean
    36→}
    37→

    43→        className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
    44→        ref={ref}

    46→      />

    48→  },

    51→function NavLink({ item, currentPath, label }: { item: NavItem; currentPath: string; label: string }) {

    61→      )}
    62→    >
    63→      <Icon className="h-4 w-4" />
    64→      {label}
    65→    </Link>
    66→  )

import * as React from "react"
import * as RadioGroupPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-radio-group"
import { Circle } from "lucide-react"
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const RadioGroup = React.forwardRef<
  React.ComponentRef<typeof RadioGroupPrimitive.Root>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof RadioGroupPrimitive.Root>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <RadioGroupPrimitive.Root className={cn("grid gap-2", className)} {...props} ref={ref} />
))
RadioGroup.displayName = RadioGroupPrimitive.Root.displayName

const RadioGroupItem = React.forwardRef<
  React.ComponentRef<typeof RadioGroupPrimitive.Item>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof RadioGroupPrimitive.Item>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <RadioGroupPrimitive.Item
    ref={ref}
    className={cn(
      "aspect-square h-4 w-4 rounded-full border border-primary text-primary shadow focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50",
      className,
    )}
    {...props}
  >
    <RadioGroupPrimitive.Indicator className="flex items-center justify-center">
      <Circle className="h-2.5 w-2.5 fill-current text-current" />
    </RadioGroupPrimitive.Indicator>
  </RadioGroupPrimitive.Item>
))
RadioGroupItem.displayName = RadioGroupPrimitive.Item.displayName

export { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem }

import * as React from "react"
import * as LabelPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-label"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const labelVariants = cva(
  "text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70",
)

const Label = React.forwardRef<
  React.ComponentRef<typeof LabelPrimitive.Root>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof LabelPrimitive.Root> & VariantProps<typeof labelVariants>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <LabelPrimitive.Root ref={ref} className={cn(labelVariants(), className)} {...props} />
))
Label.displayName = LabelPrimitive.Root.displayName

export { Label }

**Status: DONE**

## What was implemented

### UI Components (9 files)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/table.tsx` — Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/badge.tsx` — Badge with CVA variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/tabs.tsx` — Radix Tabs (Root, List, Trigger, Content)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/select.tsx` — Radix Select (Root, Trigger, Content, Item, Value)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/radio-group.tsx` — Radix RadioGroup (Root, Item)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/textarea.tsx` — Styled textarea
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/label.tsx` — Radix Label
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/dialog.tsx` — Radix Dialog (Root, Trigger, Content, Header, Footer, Title, Description, Close)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/switch.tsx` — Custom toggle switch using button+aria

### Business Component (1 file)
- `exam-web/src/components/question-form.tsx` — Reusable form for creating/editing questions with content, options A-D, correct answer radio group, and optional analysis

### Hooks (4 files)
- `exam-web/src/hooks/use-admin-exams.ts` — useAdminExamList, useCreateExam, useUpdateExam, useDeleteExam, usePublishExam, useCloseExam
- `exam-web/src/hooks/use-admin-questions.ts` — useQuestionList, useAddQuestion, useBatchImport, useUpdateQuestion, useDeleteQuestion
- `exam-web/src/hooks/use-admin-whitelist.ts` — useWhitelist, useAddWhitelist, useRemoveWhitelist
- `exam-web/src/hooks/use-admin-analysis.ts` — useScoreAnalysis, useQuestionAnalysis (with ScoreRecord and QuestionAnalysis types)

### Route Pages (6 files)
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/index.tsx` — Exam list with status badges, pagination, action buttons (edit/publish/close/delete/questions/whitelist/analysis), delete confirmation dialog
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/create.tsx` — Create exam form with all fields including switch toggles and access mode select
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.edit.tsx` — Edit exam form, fetches exam data via GET /api/exams/{id}, prefills form
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.questions.tsx` — Question management with add/edit/delete dialogs using QuestionForm
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.whitelist.tsx` — Whitelist management with user ID input, user table, remove confirmation
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.analysis.tsx` — Two-tab analysis page: score table with pagination + question analysis with progress bars

### i18n (2 files updated)
- `exam-web/src/i18n/zh.json` — Added `admin` namespace with all Chinese translations
- `exam-web/src/i18n/en.json` — Added `admin` namespace with all English translations

All components follow the existing shadcn/ui + Radix + CVA pattern established by button.tsx, input.tsx, and separator.tsx. TypeScript compiles cleanly (only pre-existing router codegen warnings remain).

---

**Translation of your request:** "You are implementing Task 13: Admin-side frontend pages. Create all admin-side frontend pages, hooks, and UI components."

**Summary of changes:** Created 20 new files for the admin management frontend: 9 shadcn/ui-style UI components (table, badge, tabs, select, radio-group, textarea, label, dialog, switch), 4 TanStack Query hooks for admin APIs (exams CRUD, questions, whitelist, analysis), 1 reusable question form component, 6 route pages (exam list/create/edit, question management, whitelist, analysis with score+question tabs), and updated both zh/en i18n files with all admin translation keys.

You are implementing Task 13: 前端管理端页面

## Task Description

Create all admin-side frontend pages, hooks, and UI components.

**Files to Create (all under exam-web/src/):**

**UI Components:**
- `components/ui/table.tsx`
- `components/ui/badge.tsx`
- `components/ui/tabs.tsx`
- `components/ui/select.tsx`
- `components/ui/radio-group.tsx`
- `components/ui/textarea.tsx`
- `components/ui/label.tsx`
- `components/ui/dialog.tsx`
- `components/ui/switch.tsx`

**Business Components:**
- `components/question-form.tsx`

**Hooks:**
- `hooks/use-admin-exams.ts`
- `hooks/use-admin-questions.ts`
- `hooks/use-admin-whitelist.ts`
- `hooks/use-admin-analysis.ts`

**Route Pages:**
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/index.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/create.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.edit.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.questions.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.whitelist.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.analysis.tsx`

## Existing Code Context

**lib/api.ts** exports: get<T>(url), post<T>(url, body), put<T>(url, body), del<T>(url, body)

**types/index.ts** has: User, Exam, Question, ExamRecord, AnswerDetail, PageResult<T>, ExamStatus, AccessMode, RecordStatus

**lib/utils.ts** has: cn()

**hooks/use-auth.ts** has: useAuth() → { user, isAdmin, isLoading }

**i18n:** useTranslation() available

**Existing UI:** button.tsx, input.tsx, separator.tsx

## Detailed Requirements

### UI Components (Radix UI + TailwindCSS + CVA pattern)

Create standard shadcn/ui-style components. Each should:
- Use the Radix UI primitive as base
- Apply TailwindCSS styling
- ForwardRef where needed
- Export named components

Key components:
- **table.tsx**: Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell — plain HTML table with Tailwind styling
- **badge.tsx**: CVA variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline)
- **tabs.tsx**: Radix Tabs (Root, List, Trigger, Content)
- **select.tsx**: Radix Select (Root, Trigger, Content, Item, Value)
- **radio-group.tsx**: Radix RadioGroup (Root, Item, Indicator)
- **textarea.tsx**: Standard textarea with Tailwind styling
- **label.tsx**: Radix Label
- **dialog.tsx**: Radix Dialog (Root, Trigger, Content, Header, Footer, Title, Description, Close)
- **switch.tsx**: Simple toggle switch (can use checkbox styled as switch, or a custom div)

### Hooks (TanStack Query)

**use-admin-exams.ts:**
```typescript
export function useAdminExamList(page: number, size: number)  // GET /api/admin/exams?page=&size=
export function useCreateExam()    // POST /api/admin/exams mutation, invalidates ['admin-exams']
export function useUpdateExam()    // PUT /api/admin/exams/{id} mutation
export function useDeleteExam()    // DELETE /api/admin/exams/{id} mutation
export function usePublishExam()   // PUT /api/admin/exams/{id}/publish mutation
export function useCloseExam()     // PUT /api/admin/exams/{id}/close mutation
```

**use-admin-questions.ts:**
```typescript
export function useQuestionList(examId: number)  // GET /api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions
export function useAddQuestion()     // POST mutation
export function useBatchImport()     // POST /batch mutation
export function useUpdateQuestion()  // PUT mutation
export function useDeleteQuestion()  // DELETE mutation
```

**use-admin-whitelist.ts:**
```typescript
export function useWhitelist(examId: number)     // GET
export function useAddWhitelist()    // POST mutation
export function useRemoveWhitelist() // DELETE mutation
```

**use-admin-analysis.ts:**
```typescript
export function useScoreAnalysis(examId: number, page: number, size: number)  // GET /scores
export function useQuestionAnalysis(examId: number)  // GET /questions
```

### question-form.tsx
Reusable form component for creating/editing questions.
Props: { defaultValues?: Partial<Question>, onSubmit: (data) => void, onCancel: () => void }
Fields: content (textarea), optionA-D (input), correctAnswer (radio-group A/B/C/D), analysis (textarea, optional)

### Route Pages

**admin/exams/index.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/')
- Table with columns: 名称, 状态(Badge), 答题人数, 创建时间
- Status badge colors: draft=secondary, published=default(green), closed=destructive
- Action buttons per row: 编辑(draft), 发布(draft), 关闭(published), 删除(draft), 题目管理, 白名单, 分析
- Top "创建试卷" button → navigate to /admin/exams/create
- Pagination (simple prev/next)

**admin/exams/create.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/create')
- Form: title(input), timeLimitMin(input number), questionCount(input number), showAnswer(switch), showAnalysis(switch), maxAttempts(input number), accessMode(select: open/whitelist)
- Submit → useCreateExam mutation → navigate to /admin/exams

**admin/exams/$id.edit.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/edit')
- Same form as create, but prefilled with exam data (fetch with GET /api/admin/exams — find from list or add a get endpoint)
- Actually, use the exam list data or just refetch. For simplicity, use the ExamService which we can call.
- Note: there's no dedicated GET /api/admin/exams/{id} endpoint in the API spec. Use the student endpoint GET /api/exams/{id} or add fetching from list. Best approach: just navigate with state or use queryClient cache.
- Simple approach: call GET /api/exams/{id} (student endpoint works for admin too since they're authenticated)
- Submit → useUpdateExam mutation → navigate back

**admin/exams/$id.questions.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/questions')
- Question list (useQuestionList)
- "添加题目" button → opens Dialog with question-form
- Each question row: sortOrder, content (truncated), correctAnswer, actions (edit/delete)
- Edit → Dialog with question-form prefilled
- Delete → confirm dialog

**admin/exams/$id.whitelist.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/whitelist')
- Input field + add button (enter user IDs comma-separated or one at a time)
- Whitelist user table: username, displayName, actions (remove)
- Bulk remove with checkboxes (optional, simple approach: individual remove buttons)

**admin/exams/$id.analysis.tsx** — createFileRoute('/_layout/admin/exams/$id/analysis')
- Tabs component with 2 tabs:
  - "得分情况": Table (displayName, score, startTime, endTime, attemptNo), pagination
  - "题目分析": List of questions, each showing: content (truncated), totalAnswered, correctCount, correctRate as percentage with a simple progress bar div

## Context

Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/
All files under exam-web/src/ subdirectory.
NOT a git repo - skip commits.
Use TypeScript, import from @/ alias.
Use useTranslation() for user-facing text where practical (at minimum nav items and buttons).

**Status: DONE**

## What was implemented

### UI Components (9 files)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/table.tsx` — Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/badge.tsx` — Badge with CVA variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/tabs.tsx` — Radix Tabs (Root, List, Trigger, Content)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/select.tsx` — Radix Select (Root, Trigger, Content, Item, Value)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/radio-group.tsx` — Radix RadioGroup (Root, Item)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/textarea.tsx` — Styled textarea
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/label.tsx` — Radix Label
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/dialog.tsx` — Radix Dialog (Root, Trigger, Content, Header, Footer, Title, Description, Close)
- `exam-web/src/components/ui/switch.tsx` — Custom toggle switch using button+aria

### Business Component (1 file)
- `exam-web/src/components/question-form.tsx` — Reusable form for creating/editing questions with content, options A-D, correct answer radio group, and optional analysis

### Hooks (4 files)
- `exam-web/src/hooks/use-admin-exams.ts` — useAdminExamList, useCreateExam, useUpdateExam, useDeleteExam, usePublishExam, useCloseExam
- `exam-web/src/hooks/use-admin-questions.ts` — useQuestionList, useAddQuestion, useBatchImport, useUpdateQuestion, useDeleteQuestion
- `exam-web/src/hooks/use-admin-whitelist.ts` — useWhitelist, useAddWhitelist, useRemoveWhitelist
- `exam-web/src/hooks/use-admin-analysis.ts` — useScoreAnalysis, useQuestionAnalysis (with ScoreRecord and QuestionAnalysis types)

### Route Pages (6 files)
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/index.tsx` — Exam list with status badges, pagination, action buttons (edit/publish/close/delete/questions/whitelist/analysis), delete confirmation dialog
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/create.tsx` — Create exam form with all fields including switch toggles and access mode select
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.edit.tsx` — Edit exam form, fetches exam data via GET /api/exams/{id}, prefills form
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.questions.tsx` — Question management with add/edit/delete dialogs using QuestionForm
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.whitelist.tsx` — Whitelist management with user ID input, user table, remove confirmation
- `exam-web/src/routes/_layout/admin/exams/$id.analysis.tsx` — Two-tab analysis page: score table with pagination + question analysis with progress bars

### i18n (2 files updated)
- `exam-web/src/i18n/zh.json` — Added `admin` namespace with all Chinese translations
- `exam-web/src/i18n/en.json` — Added `admin` namespace with all English translations

All components follow the existing shadcn/ui + Radix + CVA pattern established by button.tsx, input.tsx, and separator.tsx. TypeScript compiles cleanly (only pre-existing router codegen warnings remain).

---

**Summary of changes:** Created 20 new files for the admin management frontend: 9 shadcn/ui-style UI components (table, badge, tabs, select, radio-group, textarea, label, dialog, switch), 4 TanStack Query hooks for admin APIs (exams CRUD, questions, whitelist, analysis), 1 reusable question form component, 6 route pages (exam list/create/edit, question management, whitelist, analysis with score+question tabs), and updated both zh/en i18n files with all admin translation keys.

- `routes/_layout/records/index.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/records/$id.tsx`

## Existing Code Context

**lib/api.ts:** get<T>(url), post<T>(url, body), put<T>(url, body), del<T>(url, body)

**types/index.ts:**
```typescript
type ExamStatus = "draft" | "published" | "closed"
type AccessMode = "open" | "whitelist"
type RecordStatus = "in_progress" | "submitted" | "timeout"
interface Exam { id, title, status, timeLimitMin, showAnswer, showAnalysis, questionCount, maxAttempts, accessMode, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt }
interface ExamRecord { id, examId, userId, score, startTime, endTime, status, attemptNo }
interface Question { id, examId, content, optionA~D, correctAnswer?, analysis?, sortOrder }
interface AnswerDetail { id, recordId, questionId, userAnswer, isCorrect }
interface PageResult<T> { records, total, current, size }
```

**UI components available:** button, input, badge, dialog, radio-group, table, tabs, separator, label

**lib/utils.ts:** cn()

**i18n:** useTranslation()

## API Responses (from backend)

**GET /api/exams** → PageResult<ExamDetailResponse>
ExamDetailResponse: { id, title, status, timeLimitMin, questionCount, maxAttempts, showAnswer, showAnalysis, accessMode, remainingAttempts: number|null }

**GET /api/exams/{id}** → ExamDetailResponse (same as above)

**POST /api/exams/{id}/start** → { recordId: number, questions: [{ id, content, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, sortOrder }] }

**POST /api/exams/{id}/submit** → { score: number, status: string } (body: { recordId, answers: [{questionId, answer}] })

**GET /api/records** → PageResult<RecordDetailResponse>
RecordDetailResponse: { id, examId, examTitle, score, startTime, endTime, status, attemptNo, answers?: [...] }

**GET /api/records/{id}** → RecordDetailResponse with answers: [{ questionId, content, optionA~D, userAnswer, isCorrect, correctAnswer?, analysis? }]

## Detailed Requirements

### hooks/use-exams.ts
```typescript
// Types for API responses
interface ExamDetail {
  id: number; title: string; status: string; timeLimitMin: number;
  questionCount: number; maxAttempts: number; showAnswer: boolean;
  showAnalysis: boolean; accessMode: string; remainingAttempts: number | null;
}
interface StartExamResponse {
  recordId: number;
  questions: Array<{ id: number; content: string; optionA: string; optionB: string; optionC: string; optionD: string; sortOrder: number }>;
}
interface SubmitExamResponse { score: number; status: string }

export function useExamList(page: number, size: number)  // GET /api/exams?page=&size=
export function useExamDetail(id: number)  // GET /api/exams/{id}
export function useStartExam()  // POST /api/exams/{id}/start mutation, returns StartExamResponse
export function useSubmitExam()  // POST /api/exams/{id}/submit mutation
```

### hooks/use-records.ts
```typescript
export function useRecordList(page: number, size: number)  // GET /api/records?page=&size=
export function useRecordDetail(id: number)  // GET /api/records/{id}
```

### components/exam-card.tsx
Props: { exam: ExamDetail, onClick: () => void }
- Card layout with padding and border, hover effect
- Title (bold, truncate if long)
- Badge for status (published = green "进行中")
- Info items: 题目数: N题, 时限: N分钟 or "不限时", 剩余次数: N次 or "不限"
- Use lucide-react icons: Clock, FileQuestion, RotateCcw

### components/countdown-timer.tsx
Props: { startTime: string, timeLimitMin: number, onTimeUp: () => void }
- Calculate remaining = timeLimitMin * 60 - elapsed seconds since startTime
- useEffect with setInterval(1000ms) to decrement
- Display MM:SS format
- When remaining < 60: red text + pulse animation
- When remaining <= 0: call onTimeUp() once
- Cleanup interval on unmount

### routes/_layout/exams/index.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/exams/')
- Grid layout (1 col mobile, 2 cols md, 3 cols lg)
- Map exams to ExamCard components
- onClick → navigate to /exams/{id}
- Pagination (simple)
- Empty state: "暂无可参加的考试"

### routes/_layout/exams/$id.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/exams/$id')
- Fetch exam detail with useExamDetail
- Card with exam info: title, timeLimitMin (or 不限时), questionCount, remainingAttempts (or 不限)
- "开始考试" button
  - Disabled if remainingAttempts === 0
  - onClick → confirm dialog → startExam mutation → navigate to /exams/{id}/take with state { recordId, questions, startTime, timeLimitMin }
- Loading state

### routes/_layout/exams/$id.take.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/exams/$id/take')
- Get recordId, questions, exam info from router state or location state
- If no state, redirect back to /exams/{id}
- State: answers: Record<number, string> = {} (questionId → selected answer)
- Current question index state
- Top bar: exam title + countdown timer (if timeLimitMin > 0)
- Question display: current question number/total, content, radio buttons for A/B/C/D
- Each option shows: "A. {optionA}" as radio label
- Bottom: prev/next buttons + question number grid (clickable, colored: answered=blue, current=ring, unanswered=gray)
- Submit button: opens confirm dialog "确认提交？提交后不可修改"
- onTimeUp callback: auto-submit with current answers
- After submit success: navigate to /records/{recordId}
- Handle submit error with toast (sonner)

### routes/_layout/records/index.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/records/')
- Table: 试卷名称, 分数, 状态(Badge), 考试时间
- Status badge: submitted=default, timeout=destructive
- Score display: N分 or "-" if null
- Time display: format startTime
- Click row → navigate to /records/{id}
- Pagination

### routes/_layout/records/$id.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/records/$id')
- Fetch record detail with useRecordDetail
- Top summary card: score (large font), status badge, 用时 (endTime - startTime formatted)
- Answer review list:
  - For each answer: question number, content, 4 options
  - User's answer highlighted (green if correct, red if wrong)
  - If correctAnswer provided: show correct answer indicator
  - If analysis provided: show in a muted block below
- Back button to /records

All files under exam-web/src/ subdirectory.

  - onClick → confirm dialog → startExam mutation → navigate to /exams/{id}/take with state { recordId, questions, startTime, timeLimitMin }
- Loading state

### routes/_layout/exams/$id.take.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/exams/$id/take')
- Get recordId, questions, exam info from router state or location state
- If no state, redirect back to /exams/{id}
- State: answers: Record<number, string> = {} (questionId → selected answer)
- Current question index state
- Top bar: exam title + countdown timer (if timeLimitMin > 0)
- Question display: current question number/total, content, radio buttons for A/B/C/D
- Each option shows: "A. {optionA}" as radio label
- Bottom: prev/next buttons + question number grid (clickable, colored: answered=blue, current=ring, unanswered=gray)
- Submit button: opens confirm dialog "确认提交？提交后不可修改"
- onTimeUp callback: auto-submit with current answers
- After submit success: navigate to /records/{recordId}
- Handle submit error with toast (sonner)

### routes/_layout/records/index.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/records/')
- Table: 试卷名称, 分数, 状态(Badge), 考试时间
- Status badge: submitted=default, timeout=destructive
- Score display: N分 or "-" if null
- Time display: format startTime
- Click row → navigate to /records/{id}
- Pagination

### routes/_layout/records/$id.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/records/$id')
- Fetch record detail with useRecordDetail
- Top summary card: score (large font), status badge, 用时 (endTime - startTime formatted)
- Answer review list:
  - For each answer: question number, content, 4 options
  - User's answer highlighted (green if correct, red if wrong)
  - If correctAnswer provided: show correct answer indicator
  - If analysis provided: show in a muted block below
- Back button to /records

1→import { ClipboardList, History, Settings } from "lucide-react"
     2→import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"
     3→import { Link, useRouterState } from "@tanstack/react-router"
     4→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
     5→import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"
     6→
     7→interface SideNavProps {
     8→  isAdmin: boolean
     9→}
    10→
    11→interface NavItem {
    12→  icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>
    13→  labelKey: string
    14→  to: string
    15→}
    16→
    17→const userNavItems: NavItem[] = [
    18→  { icon: ClipboardList, labelKey: "nav.myExams", to: "/exams" },
    19→  { icon: History, labelKey: "nav.records", to: "/records" },
    20→]
    21→
    22→const adminNavItems: NavItem[] = [
    23→  { icon: Settings, labelKey: "nav.examManagement", to: "/admin/exams" },
    24→]
    25→
    26→export function SideNav({ isAdmin }: SideNavProps) {
    27→  const { t } = useTranslation()
    28→  const routerState = useRouterState()
    29→  const currentPath = routerState.location.pathname
    30→
    31→  return (
    32→    <aside className="flex h-full w-56 shrink-0 flex-col border-r bg-white">
    33→      <nav className="flex flex-1 flex-col gap-1 p-3">
    34→        {userNavItems.map((item) => (
    35→          <NavLink key={item.to} item={item} currentPath={currentPath} label={t(item.labelKey)} />
    36→        ))}
    37→
    38→        {isAdmin && (
    39→          <>
    40→            <Separator className="my-2" />
    41→            {adminNavItems.map((item) => (
    42→              <NavLink key={item.to} item={item} currentPath={currentPath} label={t(item.labelKey)} />
    43→            ))}
    44→          </>
    45→        )}
    46→      </nav>
    47→    </aside>
    48→  )
    49→}
    50→
    51→function NavLink({ item, currentPath, label }: { item: NavItem; currentPath: string; label: string }) {
    52→  const isActive = currentPath.startsWith(item.to)
    53→  const Icon = item.icon
    54→
    55→  return (
    56→    <Link
    57→      to={item.to}
    58→      className={cn(
    59→        "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
    60→        isActive && "bg-accent text-accent-foreground",
    61→      )}
    62→    >
    63→      <Icon className="h-4 w-4" />
    64→      {label}
    65→    </Link>
    66→  )
    67→}
