---

Translation of your request: "You are implementing Task 14: Student-facing frontend pages."

---

**Status: DONE**

## What was implemented

Created all 9 files for the student-facing exam pages, plus i18n updates:

### Hooks (data layer)
- **`exam-web/src/hooks/use-exams.ts`** -- `useExamList`, `useExamDetail`, `useStartExam`, `useSubmitExam` hooks wrapping the student API endpoints with react-query
- **`exam-web/src/hooks/use-records.ts`** -- `useRecordList`, `useRecordDetail` hooks for exam records

### Components
- **`exam-web/src/components/exam-card.tsx`** -- Card component showing exam title, status badge, question count, time limit, remaining attempts with lucide-react icons
- **`exam-web/src/components/countdown-timer.tsx`** -- MM:SS countdown timer with red pulse animation under 60s, auto-calls `onTimeUp()` at zero, prevents double-fire via ref

### Route pages
- **`exam-web/src/routes/_layout/exams/index.tsx`** -- Grid layout (1/2/3 cols responsive), ExamCard list with pagination, empty state
- **`exam-web/src/routes/_layout/exams/$id.tsx`** -- Exam detail card with start button, disabled when `remainingAttempts === 0`, confirm dialog before starting, navigates to take page with state
- **`exam-web/src/routes/_layout/exams/$id.take.tsx`** -- Full exam-taking UI: top bar with title + countdown, question display with radio options (A/B/C/D), prev/next navigation, clickable question number grid (blue=answered, ring=current, gray=unanswered), submit confirm dialog, auto-submit on timeout, double-submit prevention via ref
- **`exam-web/src/routes/_layout/records/index.tsx`** -- Table view of exam records (title, score, status badge, time), clickable rows, pagination
- **`exam-web/src/routes/_layout/records/$id.tsx`** -- Record detail with score summary card, answer review list showing user answer highlighting (green correct / red wrong), correct answer indicator, analysis block

### i18n
- **`exam-web/src/i18n/zh.json`** -- Added `exam` namespace with all Chinese translations
- **`exam-web/src/i18n/en.json`** -- Added `exam` namespace with all English translations

## Key design decisions
- Followed existing project patterns (react-query hooks, sonner toast, shadcn/ui components, tanstack router file-based routing, i18n via `useTranslation()`)
- Used `window.history.state.usr` to pass exam data to the take page (TanStack Router location state), with redirect fallback if no state present
- Used `useRef` for both `onTimeUp` callback (to avoid stale closure) and `submittingRef` (to prevent double submit from timeout + manual click race)

## Files changed

toolUseResult.prompt:
You are implementing Task 14: 前端考生端页面

## Task Description

**Files to Create (all under exam-web/src/):**
- `hooks/use-exams.ts`
- `hooks/use-records.ts`
- `components/exam-card.tsx`
- `components/countdown-timer.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/exams/index.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/exams/$id.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/exams/$id.take.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/records/index.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/records/$id.tsx`

## Existing Code Context

**lib/api.ts:** get<T>(url), post<T>(url, body), put<T>(url, body), del<T>(url, body)

**types/index.ts:**
```typescript
type ExamStatus = "draft" | "published" | "closed"
type AccessMode = "open" | "whitelist"
type RecordStatus = "in_progress" | "submitted" | "timeout"
interface Exam { id, title, status, timeLimitMin, showAnswer, showAnalysis, questionCount, maxAttempts, accessMode, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt }
interface ExamRecord { id, examId, userId, score, startTime, endTime, status, attemptNo }
interface Question { id, examId, content, optionA~D, correctAnswer?, analysis?, sortOrder }
interface AnswerDetail { id, recordId, questionId, userAnswer, isCorrect }
interface PageResult<T> { records, total, current, size }
```

**UI components available:** button, input, badge, dialog, radio-group, table, tabs, separator, label

**lib/utils.ts:** cn()

**i18n:** useTranslation()

## API Responses (from backend)

**GET /api/exams** → PageResult<ExamDetailResponse>
ExamDetailResponse: { id, title, status, timeLimitMin, questionCount, maxAttempts, showAnswer, showAnalysis, accessMode, remainingAttempts: number|null }

**GET /api/exams/{id}** → ExamDetailResponse (same as above)

**POST /api/exams/{id}/start** → { recordId: number, questions: [{ id, content, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, sortOrder }] }

**POST /api/exams/{id}/submit** → { score: number, status: string } (body: { recordId, answers: [{questionId, answer}] })

**GET /api/records** → PageResult<RecordDetailResponse>
RecordDetailResponse: { id, examId, examTitle, score, startTime, endTime, status, attemptNo, answers?: [...] }

**GET /api/records/{id}** → RecordDetailResponse with answers: [{ questionId, content, optionA~D, userAnswer, isCorrect, correctAnswer?, analysis? }]

## Detailed Requirements

### hooks/use-exams.ts
```typescript
// Types for API responses
interface ExamDetail {
  id: number; title: string; status: string; timeLimitMin: number;
  questionCount: number; maxAttempts: number; showAnswer: boolean;
  showAnalysis: boolean; accessMode: string; remainingAttempts: number | null;
}
interface StartExamResponse {
  recordId: number;
  questions: Array<{ id: number; content: string; optionA: string; optionB: string; optionC: string; optionD: string; sortOrder: number }>;
}
interface SubmitExamResponse { score: number; status: string }

export function useExamList(page: number, size: number)  // GET /api/exams?page=&size=
export function useExamDetail(id: number)  // GET /api/exams/{id}
export function useStartExam()  // POST /api/exams/{id}/start mutation, returns StartExamResponse
export function useSubmitExam()  // POST /api/exams/{id}/submit mutation
```

### hooks/use-records.ts
```typescript
export function useRecordList(page: number, size: number)  // GET /api/records?page=&size=
export function useRecordDetail(id: number)  // GET /api/records/{id}
```

### components/exam-card.tsx
Props: { exam: ExamDetail, onClick: () => void }
- Card layout with padding and border, hover effect
- Title (bold, truncate if long)
- Badge for status (published = green "进行中")
- Info items: 题目数: N题, 时限: N分钟 or "不限时", 剩余次数: N次 or "不限"
- Use lucide-react icons: Clock, FileQuestion, RotateCcw

### components/countdown-timer.tsx
Props: { startTime: string, timeLimitMin: number, onTimeUp: () => void }
- Calculate remaining = timeLimitMin * 60 - elapsed seconds since startTime
- useEffect with setInterval(1000ms) to decrement
- Display MM:SS format
- When remaining < 60: red text + pulse animation
- When remaining <= 0: call onTimeUp() once
- Cleanup interval on unmount

### routes/_layout/exams/index.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/exams/')
- Grid layout (1 col mobile, 2 cols md, 3 cols lg)
- Map exams to ExamCard components
- onClick → navigate to /exams/{id}
- Pagination (simple)
- Empty state: "暂无可参加的考试"

### routes/_layout/exams/$id.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/exams/$id')
- Fetch exam detail with useExamDetail
- Card with exam info: title, timeLimitMin (or 不限时), questionCount, remainingAttempts (or 不限)
- "开始考试" button
  - Disabled if remainingAttempts === 0
  - onClick → confirm dialog → startExam mutation → navigate to /exams/{id}/take with state { recordId, questions, startTime, timeLimitMin }
- Loading state

### routes/_layout/exams/$id.take.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/exams/$id/take')
- Get recordId, questions, exam info from router state or location state
- If no state, redirect back to /exams/{id}
- State: answers: Record<number, string> = {} (questionId → selected answer)
- Current question index state
- Top bar: exam title + countdown timer (if timeLimitMin > 0)
- Question display: current question number/total, content, radio buttons for A/B/C/D
- Each option shows: "A. {optionA}" as radio label
- Bottom: prev/next buttons + question number grid (clickable, colored: answered=blue, current=ring, unanswered=gray)
- Submit button: opens confirm dialog "确认提交？提交后不可修改"
- onTimeUp callback: auto-submit with current answers
- After submit success: navigate to /records/{recordId}
- Handle submit error with toast (sonner)

### routes/_layout/records/index.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/records/')
- Table: 试卷名称, 分数, 状态(Badge), 考试时间
- Status badge: submitted=default, timeout=destructive
- Score display: N分 or "-" if null
- Time display: format startTime
- Click row → navigate to /records/{id}
- Pagination

### routes/_layout/records/$id.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/records/$id')
- Fetch record detail with useRecordDetail
- Top summary card: score (large font), status badge, 用时 (endTime - startTime formatted)
- Answer review list:
  - For each answer: question number, content, 4 options
  - User's answer highlighted (green if correct, red if wrong)
  - If correctAnswer provided: show correct answer indicator
  - If analysis provided: show in a muted block below
- Back button to /records

## Context

Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/
All files under exam-web/src/ subdirectory.
NOT a git repo - skip commits.
Use TypeScript, import from @/ alias.
Use useTranslation() for key UI text.
Use sonner toast for success/error notifications.

## i18n additions needed in zh.json / en.json:
Add an "exam" namespace with keys for student-facing text (exam list title, start exam, submit, confirm, time's up, no exams, score, etc.)

## Report Format

When done, report:
- **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- What you implemented
- Files changed

Create a skill definition document that describes how an AI Skill (Claude Code or similar) should parse a txt question bank file and import questions into the exam system via API.

**File to Create:**
- `exam-system/skill/exam-import-skill.md`

## Requirements

The skill document should contain:

### 1. Skill Overview
- Name: 题库导入 Skill
- Purpose: Read a local txt question bank file, parse questions, and batch import them into the exam system via API

### 2. Input Parameters
| Parameter | Required | Description |
|-----------|----------|-------------|
| filePath | Yes | Path to the txt question bank file |
| examId | Yes | Target exam ID to import questions into |
| apiBaseUrl | Yes | Exam system API base URL (e.g., http://localhost:8080) |
| token | Yes | Admin JWT token for authentication |

### 3. Recommended txt File Format
Show a clear example:
```
1. Java中哪个关键字用于继承？
A. implements
B. extends
C. inherits
D. super
答案：B
解析：extends关键字用于类的继承，implements用于接口实现。

2. 下一题内容...
A. 选项A
B. 选项B
C. 选项C
D. 选项D
答案：A
解析：解析内容（可选）
```

Explain the format rules:
- Each question starts with a number + period + space + question content
- Options A-D each on their own line, format: "A. content"
- Answer line: "答案：X" where X is A/B/C/D
- Analysis line: "解析：content" (optional)
- Questions separated by blank line(s)

### 4. Execution Steps (for the AI to follow)
1. Read the txt file content
2. Parse each question block into structured data
3. Validate: each question must have content, 4 options, and a valid correct answer (A/B/C/D)
4. Build the JSON payload matching the batch import API format:
```json
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "content": "题目内容",
      "optionA": "选项A文本",
      "optionB": "选项B文本", 
      "optionC": "选项C文本",
      "optionD": "选项D文本",
      "correctAnswer": "B",
      "analysis": "解析内容"
    }
  ]
}
```
5. Call the API: POST {apiBaseUrl}/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions/batch
   - Header: Authorization: Bearer {token}
   - Header: Content-Type: application/json
6. Report results: total parsed, successfully imported, any failures with reasons

### 5. Example curl Command
Show a complete curl example for the batch import

### 6. Error Handling
- File not found
- Parse errors (missing options, invalid answer format)
- API errors (401 unauthorized, exam not in draft status, validation errors)

### 7. AI Prompt Template
Provide a prompt that can be given to an AI to execute this skill. Something like:
```
请读取文件 {filePath}，解析其中的单选题，然后调用以下 API 批量导入到考试系统：

API: POST {apiBaseUrl}/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions/batch
Token: {token}

请按照以下步骤执行：
1. 读取文件内容
2. 解析每道题的题干、选项A-D、正确答案、解析
3. 构建 JSON 请求体
4. 调用 API 导入
5. 报告导入结果
```

## Context

Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/
Create file at: exam-system/skill/exam-import-skill.md
NOT a git repo - skip commits.
Write in Chinese (the doc is for Chinese-speaking users).

## Report Format

When done, report:
- **Status:** DONE
- Files changed

input.content:
# 题库导入 Skill

## 1. Skill 概述

- **名称：** 题库导入 Skill
- **用途：** 读取本地 txt 题库文件，解析其中的单选题，通过 API 批量导入到考试系统中
- **适用 AI：** Claude Code 或类似的 AI 编程助手

## 2. 输入参数

| 参数 | 必填 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| filePath | 是 | txt 题库文件的本地路径 |
| examId | 是 | 目标考试 ID，题目将导入到此考试下 |
| apiBaseUrl | 是 | 考试系统 API 基础地址（如 `http://localhost:8080`） |
| token | 是 | 管理员 JWT Token，用于接口鉴权 |

## 3. txt 文件格式规范

### 示例文件

```
1. Java中哪个关键字用于继承？
A. implements
B. extends
C. inherits
D. super
答案：B
解析：extends关键字用于类的继承，implements用于接口实现。

2. 以下哪个不是Java的基本数据类型？
A. int
B. String
C. boolean
D. double
答案：B
解析：String是引用类型，不是基本数据类型。Java的8种基本数据类型为byte、short、int、long、float、double、boolean、char。

3. Java中用于实现接口的关键字是？
A. extends
B. implements
C. interface
D. abstract
答案：B
```

### 格式规则

1. **题号行：** 以数字 + 英文句号 + 空格 + 题目内容开头，如 `1. 题目内容`
2. **选项行：** 每个选项单独一行，格式为 `A. 选项内容`（支持 A/B/C/D 四个选项）
3. **答案行：** 格式为 `答案：X`，其中 X 为 A/B/C/D 之一（中文冒号）
4. **解析行：** 格式为 `解析：解析内容`（可选，不写则留空）
5. **题目间隔：** 题目之间用一个或多个空行分隔

### 注意事项

- 选项必须完整提供 A、B、C、D 四个
- 答案只能是 A、B、C、D 中的一个大写字母
- 解析行是可选的，没有解析可以省略
- 文件编码建议使用 UTF-8

## 4. 执行步骤

AI 接到任务后，应按以下步骤执行：

### 步骤一：读取文件

使用文件读取工具读取 `filePath` 指定的 txt 文件内容。如果文件不存在，立即报错并终止。

### 步骤二：解析题目

将文件内容按空行分割为多个题目块，对每个题目块解析出以下字段：

- `content` — 题干内容（去掉题号前缀）
- `optionA` — 选项 A 文本（去掉 `A. ` 前缀）
- `optionB` — 选项 B 文本（去掉 `B. ` 前缀）
- `optionC` — 选项 C 文本（去掉 `C. ` 前缀）
- `optionD` — 选项 D 文本（去掉 `D. ` 前缀）
- `correctAnswer` — 正确答案，值为 A/B/C/D
- `analysis` — 解析内容（可为空字符串）

**解析正则参考：**

```
题号行: /^\d+\.\s+(.+)$/
选项行: /^([ABCD])\.\s+(.+)$/
答案行: /^答案[：:]\s*([ABCD])$/
解析行: /^解析[：:]\s*(.+)$/
```

### 步骤三：校验数据

逐题检查：

- 题干内容不能为空
- 必须有 A、B、C、D 四个选项且不为空
- 正确答案必须是 A/B/C/D 之一

校验失败的题目记录错误原因，不纳入导入列表。

### 步骤四：构建请求体

将校验通过的题目组装为 JSON 请求体，格式如下：

```json
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "content": "Java中哪个关键字用于继承？",
      "optionA": "implements",
      "optionB": "extends",
      "optionC": "inherits",
      "optionD": "super",
      "correctAnswer": "B",
      "analysis": "extends关键字用于类的继承，implements用于接口实现。"
    },
    {
      "content": "以下哪个不是Java的基本数据类型？",
      "optionA": "int",
      "optionB": "String",
      "optionC": "boolean",
      "optionD": "double",
      "correctAnswer": "B",
      "analysis": "String是引用类型，不是基本数据类型。Java的8种基本数据类型为byte、short、int、long、float、double、boolean、char。"
    }
  ]
}
```

### 步骤五：调用 API

发送 HTTP 请求：

- **方法：** POST
- **URL：** `{apiBaseUrl}/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions/batch`
- **请求头：**
  - `Authorization: Bearer {token}`
  - `Content-Type: application/json`
- **请求体：** 步骤四中构建的 JSON

### 步骤六：报告结果

汇总输出以下信息：

- 文件中共解析到 N 道题
- 校验通过 M 道题
- 校验失败 K 道题（逐一列出失败原因）
- API 调用结果：成功导入的题目数量
- 如有 API 错误，输出错误信息

## 5. curl 示例

```bash
curl -X POST "http://localhost:8080/api/admin/exams/1/questions/batch" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..." \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "questions": [
      {
        "content": "Java中哪个关键字用于继承？",
        "optionA": "implements",
        "optionB": "extends",
        "optionC": "inherits",
        "optionD": "super",
        "correctAnswer": "B",
        "analysis": "extends关键字用于类的继承，implements用于接口实现。"
      },
      {
        "content": "以下哪个不是Java的基本数据类型？",
        "optionA": "int",
        "optionB": "String",
        "optionC": "boolean",
        "optionD": "double",
        "correctAnswer": "B",
        "analysis": "String是引用类型，不是基本数据类型。"
      }
    ]
  }'
```

**成功响应示例：**

```json
{
  "code": 200,
  "msg": "ok",
  "data": 2
}
```

其中 `data` 为成功导入的题目数量。

## 6. 错误处理

### 文件相关

| 错误场景 | 处理方式 |
|----------|----------|
| 文件不存在 | 报错提示文件路径不正确，终止执行 |
| 文件为空 | 报错提示文件内容为空，终止执行 |
| 文件编码异常 | 尝试以 UTF-8 和 GBK 编码读取，都失败则报错 |

### 解析相关

| 错误场景 | 处理方式 |
|----------|----------|
| 缺少选项（不足4个） | 跳过该题，记录错误：第 N 题选项不完整 |
| 答案行缺失 | 跳过该题，记录错误：第 N 题缺少答案 |
| 答案不是 A/B/C/D | 跳过该题，记录错误：第 N 题答案格式错误 |
| 题干为空 | 跳过该题，记录错误：第 N 题题干为空 |

### API 相关

| HTTP 状态码 | 含义 | 处理方式 |
|-------------|------|----------|
| 200 | 成功 | 输出导入成功的题目数量 |
| 401 | Token 无效或过期 | 提示用户重新获取 Token |
| 403 | 无权限（非管理员） | 提示需要管理员账号 |
| 400 | 请求体校验失败 | 输出具体的校验错误信息 |
| 500 | 服务器内部错误 | 输出错误信息，提示检查考试状态（考试必须为草稿状态才能添加题目） |

## 7. AI Prompt 模板

将以下 prompt 发送给 AI（替换大括号中的参数），即可触发题库导入：

```
请读取文件 {filePath}，解析其中的单选题，然后调用以下 API 批量导入到考试系统：

API: POST {apiBaseUrl}/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions/batch
Token: {token}

请按照以下步骤执行：
1. 读取文件内容
2. 按空行分割题目块，解析每道题的题干、选项A-D、正确答案、解析
3. 校验每道题的完整性（题干非空、4个选项非空、答案为A/B/C/D）
4. 将校验通过的题目构建为 JSON 请求体，格式为：
   {"questions": [{"content":"题干","optionA":"A选项","optionB":"B选项","optionC":"C选项","optionD":"D选项","correctAnswer":"B","analysis":"解析"}]}
5. 使用 curl 调用 API 导入，请求头带上 Authorization: Bearer {token}
6. 报告导入结果：共解析N道题，校验通过M道，导入成功K道，失败的列出原因
```

### 使用示例

```
请读取文件 D:/questions/java-basic.txt，解析其中的单选题，然后调用以下 API 批量导入到考试系统：

API: POST http://localhost:8080/api/admin/exams/1/questions/batch
Token: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxIiwiZXhwIjoxNzE...

请按照以下步骤执行：
1. 读取文件内容
2. 按空行分割题目块，解析每道题的题干、选项A-D、正确答案、解析
3. 校验每道题的完整性（题干非空、4个选项非空、答案为A/B/C/D）
4. 将校验通过的题目构建为 JSON 请求体，格式为：
   {"questions": [{"content":"题干","optionA":"A选项","optionB":"B选项","optionC":"C选项","optionD":"D选项","correctAnswer":"B","analysis":"解析"}]}
5. 使用 curl 调用 API 导入，请求头带上 Authorization: Bearer {token}
6. 报告导入结果：共解析N道题，校验通过M道，导入成功K道，失败的列出原因
```

You are implementing Task 15: AI Skill 定义

## Task Description

Create a skill definition document that describes how an AI Skill (Claude Code or similar) should parse a txt question bank file and import questions into the exam system via API.

**File to Create:**
- `exam-system/skill/exam-import-skill.md`

## Requirements

The skill document should contain:

### 1. Skill Overview
- Name: 题库导入 Skill
- Purpose: Read a local txt question bank file, parse questions, and batch import them into the exam system via API

### 2. Input Parameters
| Parameter | Required | Description |
|-----------|----------|-------------|
| filePath | Yes | Path to the txt question bank file |
| examId | Yes | Target exam ID to import questions into |
| apiBaseUrl | Yes | Exam system API base URL (e.g., http://localhost:8080) |
| token | Yes | Admin JWT token for authentication |

### 3. Recommended txt File Format
Show a clear example:
```
1. Java中哪个关键字用于继承？
A. implements
B. extends
C. inherits
D. super
答案：B
解析：extends关键字用于类的继承，implements用于接口实现。

2. 下一题内容...
A. 选项A
B. 选项B
C. 选项C
D. 选项D
答案：A
解析：解析内容（可选）
```

Explain the format rules:
- Each question starts with a number + period + space + question content
- Options A-D each on their own line, format: "A. content"
- Answer line: "答案：X" where X is A/B/C/D
- Analysis line: "解析：content" (optional)
- Questions separated by blank line(s)

### 4. Execution Steps (for the AI to follow)
1. Read the txt file content
2. Parse each question block into structured data
3. Validate: each question must have content, 4 options, and a valid correct answer (A/B/C/D)
4. Build the JSON payload matching the batch import API format:
```json
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "content": "题目内容",
      "optionA": "选项A文本",
      "optionB": "选项B文本", 
      "optionC": "选项C文本",
      "optionD": "选项D文本",
      "correctAnswer": "B",
      "analysis": "解析内容"
    }
  ]
}
```
5. Call the API: POST {apiBaseUrl}/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions/batch
   - Header: Authorization: Bearer {token}
   - Header: Content-Type: application/json
6. Report results: total parsed, successfully imported, any failures with reasons

### 5. Example curl Command
Show a complete curl example for the batch import

### 6. Error Handling
- File not found
- Parse errors (missing options, invalid answer format)
- API errors (401 unauthorized, exam not in draft status, validation errors)

### 7. AI Prompt Template
Provide a prompt that can be given to an AI to execute this skill. Something like:
```
请读取文件 {filePath}，解析其中的单选题，然后调用以下 API 批量导入到考试系统：

API: POST {apiBaseUrl}/api/admin/exams/{examId}/questions/batch
Token: {token}

请按照以下步骤执行：
1. 读取文件内容
2. 解析每道题的题干、选项A-D、正确答案、解析
3. 构建 JSON 请求体
4. 调用 API 导入
5. 报告导入结果
```

## Context

Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/
Create file at: exam-system/skill/exam-import-skill.md
NOT a git repo - skip commits.
Write in Chinese (the doc is for Chinese-speaking users).

全部确认完毕，代码文件齐全：

**后端 `exam-system/`** — 63 个源文件（不含 target 编译产物）
- 1 pom.xml + 1 启动类 + 1 application.yml
- 1 schema.sql + 2 Mapper XML
- 7 实体 + 3 枚举 + 8 Mapper + 6 Service + 6 Controller
- 15 DTO + 3 异常类 + 1 工具类 + 4 配置类
- 1 AI Skill 文档

**前端 `exam-web/`** — 49 个源文件
- 6 配置文件（package.json, vite, ts, biome）
- 12 UI 组件 + 3 业务组件
- 7 hooks + 3 lib + 1 types
- 14 路由页面 + 3 i18n 文件

下一步你可以：
1. 后端：建库执行 `schema.sql`，然后 `mvn spring-boot:run`
2. 前端：`cd exam-web && npm install && npm run dev`
3. 配置 OA OAuth2 参数

file.content:
-- ============================================================
-- Exam System DDL
-- ============================================================

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sys_user` (
    `id`           BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `oa_user_id`   VARCHAR(64)  NOT NULL COMMENT 'OA 系统用户 ID',
    `username`     VARCHAR(64)  NOT NULL COMMENT '用户名',
    `display_name` VARCHAR(64)  NULL     COMMENT '显示名称',
    `is_admin`     TINYINT(1)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否管理员',
    `created_at`   DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at`   DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE INDEX `uk_oa_user_id` (`oa_user_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='系统用户';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam` (
    `id`              BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `title`           VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL COMMENT '试卷名称',
    `status`          VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' COMMENT 'draft/published/closed',
    `time_limit_min`  INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '考试时限（分钟），0=不限时',
    `show_answer`     TINYINT(1)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '交卷后是否显示正确答案',
    `show_analysis`   TINYINT(1)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '交卷后是否显示解析',
    `question_count`  INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '动态抽题数，0=全部',
    `max_attempts`    INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '最大考试次数，0=不限',
    `access_mode`     VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open' COMMENT 'open/whitelist',
    `created_by`      BIGINT       NOT NULL COMMENT '创建者 FK sys_user.id',
    `created_at`      DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at`      DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_created_by` (`created_by`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `question_bank` (
    `id`              BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `exam_id`         BIGINT       NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK exam.id',
    `content`         TEXT         NOT NULL COMMENT '题目内容',
    `option_a`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `option_b`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `option_c`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `option_d`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `correct_answer`  CHAR(1)      NOT NULL COMMENT 'A/B/C/D',
    `analysis`        TEXT         NULL     COMMENT '解析',
    `sort_order`      INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `created_at`      DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_exam_id` (`exam_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='题库';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_whitelist` (
    `id`         BIGINT   NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `exam_id`    BIGINT   NOT NULL,
    `user_id`    BIGINT   NOT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE INDEX `uk_exam_user` (`exam_id`, `user_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试白名单';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_record` (
    `id`         BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `exam_id`    BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    `user_id`    BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    `score`      DECIMAL(5,2) NULL     COMMENT '得分',
    `start_time` DATETIME     NOT NULL COMMENT '开始时间',
    `end_time`   DATETIME     NULL     COMMENT '结束时间',
    `status`     VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'in_progress' COMMENT 'in_progress/submitted/timeout',
    `attempt_no` INT          NOT NULL COMMENT '第几次考试',
    `created_at` DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_exam_user` (`exam_id`, `user_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试记录';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_record_question` (
    `id`          BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `record_id`   BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK exam_record.id',
    `question_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK question_bank.id',
    `sort_order`  INT    NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '本次考试中的题序',
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_record_id` (`record_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试记录-题目关联';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `answer_detail` (
    `id`          BIGINT     NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `record_id`   BIGINT     NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK exam_record.id',
    `question_id` BIGINT     NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK question_bank.id',
    `user_answer` CHAR(1)    NULL     COMMENT '用户答案',
    `is_correct`  TINYINT(1) NULL     COMMENT '是否正确',
    `created_at`  DATETIME   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE INDEX `uk_record_question` (`record_id`, `question_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='答题明细';

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="com.exam.mapper.ExamMapper">

    <select id="selectExamListWithCount" resultType="com.exam.dto.ExamListResponse">
        SELECT e.*,
            (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT er.user_id)
             FROM exam_record er
             WHERE er.exam_id = e.id
               AND er.status IN ('submitted','timeout')) AS respondent_count
        FROM exam e
        ORDER BY e.created_at DESC
    </select>

</mapper>

content.content:
1→<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
     2→<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
     3→        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
     4→<mapper namespace="com.exam.mapper.AnalysisMapper">
     5→
     6→    <select id="selectScoreAnalysis" resultType="com.exam.dto.ScoreAnalysisResponse">
     7→        SELECT er.user_id, su.display_name, er.score, er.start_time, er.end_time, er.attempt_no
     8→        FROM exam_record er
     9→        JOIN sys_user su ON er.user_id = su.id
    10→        WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId}
    11→          AND er.status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
    12→        ORDER BY er.score DESC, er.end_time ASC
    13→    </select>
    14→
    15→    <select id="selectQuestionAnalysis" resultType="com.exam.dto.QuestionAnalysisResponse">
    16→        SELECT qb.id AS question_id, qb.content,
    17→            COUNT(ad.id) AS total_answered,
    18→            SUM(CASE WHEN ad.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correct_count
    19→        FROM question_bank qb
    20→        LEFT JOIN answer_detail ad ON qb.id = ad.question_id
    21→            AND ad.record_id IN (
    22→                SELECT id FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
    23→            )
    24→        WHERE qb.exam_id = #{examId}
    25→        GROUP BY qb.id, qb.content, qb.sort_order
    26→        ORDER BY qb.sort_order

file.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="com.exam.mapper.AnalysisMapper">

    <select id="selectScoreAnalysis" resultType="com.exam.dto.ScoreAnalysisResponse">
        SELECT er.user_id, su.display_name, er.score, er.start_time, er.end_time, er.attempt_no
        FROM exam_record er
        JOIN sys_user su ON er.user_id = su.id
        WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId}
          AND er.status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
        ORDER BY er.score DESC, er.end_time ASC
    </select>

    <select id="selectQuestionAnalysis" resultType="com.exam.dto.QuestionAnalysisResponse">
        SELECT qb.id AS question_id, qb.content,
            COUNT(ad.id) AS total_answered,
            SUM(CASE WHEN ad.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correct_count
        FROM question_bank qb
        LEFT JOIN answer_detail ad ON qb.id = ad.question_id
            AND ad.record_id IN (
                SELECT id FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
            )
        WHERE qb.exam_id = #{examId}
        GROUP BY qb.id, qb.content, qb.sort_order
        ORDER BY qb.sort_order
    </select>

</mapper>

-- ============================================================

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sys_user` (
    `id`           BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

    `username`     VARCHAR(64)  NOT NULL COMMENT '用户名',
    `display_name` VARCHAR(64)  NULL     COMMENT '显示名称',
    `is_admin`     TINYINT(1)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否管理员',
    `created_at`   DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at`   DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE INDEX `uk_oa_user_id` (`oa_user_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='系统用户';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam` (
    `id`              BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `title`           VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL COMMENT '试卷名称',

    `time_limit_min`  INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '考试时限（分钟），0=不限时',

    `show_analysis`   TINYINT(1)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '交卷后是否显示解析',
    `question_count`  INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '动态抽题数，0=全部',
    `max_attempts`    INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '最大考试次数，0=不限',
    `access_mode`     VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open' COMMENT 'open/whitelist',
    `created_by`      BIGINT       NOT NULL COMMENT '创建者 FK sys_user.id',
    `created_at`      DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at`      DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),

) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试';

) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='题库';

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="com.exam.mapper.ExamMapper">

    <select id="selectExamListWithCount" resultType="com.exam.dto.ExamListResponse">
        SELECT e.*,
            (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT er.user_id)
             FROM exam_record er
             WHERE er.exam_id = e.id
               AND er.status IN ('submitted','timeout')) AS respondent_count
        FROM exam e
        ORDER BY e.created_at DESC
    </select>

</mapper>

message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested building a complete online exam system from scratch, both frontend and backend. The system should support OA OAuth2/SSO login, AI Skill-based question bank import from txt files, dynamic question drawing, auto-scoring, and exam analytics. The user went through a full design → plan → implementation workflow using the superpowers skills (brainstorming → writing-plans → subagent-driven-development). After all 15 tasks were completed, the user requested adding a unified table name prefix. They initially chose "exam_" but then interrupted and changed their mind to "ex_" prefix instead.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **Backend**: Spring Boot 3.2.5 + MyBatis-Plus 3.5.6 + Spring Security (JWT-based) + MySQL
   - **Frontend**: React 19 + TypeScript + Vite 6 + TailwindCSS 4 + Radix UI + TanStack Router/Query + i18next + Biome
   - **Auth**: OA OAuth2/SSO → JWT token flow
   - **Architecture**: Monolithic Spring Boot REST API + React SPA
   - **Business Logic**: Dynamic question drawing, auto-scoring (100/total per question), timed exams (server-side validation), retry control, exam status flow (draft→published→closed→published)
   - **AI Skill**: External AI reads txt files, parses questions, calls batch import API
   - **Subagent-Driven Development**: Fresh subagent per task with two-stage review

3. Files and Code Sections:

   **Design & Planning Documents:**
   - `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-09-exam-system-design.md` - Full design spec (445 lines)
   - `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-09-exam-system.md` - Master plan index with 15 tasks
   - `docs/superpowers/plans/task-01-backend-scaffold.md` through `task-15-ai-skill.md` - Individual task plan files

   **Backend - exam-system/:**
   - `pom.xml` - Spring Boot 3.2.5, MyBatis-Plus 3.5.6, JJWT 0.12.5, spring-boot-starter-validation (added during Task 11)
   - `src/main/java/com/exam/ExamApplication.java` - Boot entry point
   - `src/main/resources/application.yml` - DB, JWT, OAuth2, CORS config with env var support
   - `src/main/resources/db/schema.sql` - 7 tables DDL (**CURRENTLY HAS "exam_" PREFIX APPLIED, NEEDS CHANGE TO "ex_"**)
   - 7 entity files in `entity/` - SysUser, Exam, QuestionBank, ExamWhitelist, ExamRecord, ExamRecordQuestion, AnswerDetail (**CURRENTLY HAS "exam_" PREFIX IN @TableName, NEEDS CHANGE TO "ex_"**)
   - 3 enums in `enums/` - ExamStatus, AccessMode, RecordStatus (implement IEnum<String>)
   - 8 mapper interfaces in `mapper/` - All extend BaseMapper, plus AnalysisMapper with custom methods
   - 2 XML mappers: `ExamMapper.xml` (**PARTIALLY UPDATED WITH "exam_" PREFIX**), `AnalysisMapper.xml` (**NOT YET UPDATED**)
   - 6 service classes in `service/` - AuthService, ExamService, QuestionService, WhitelistService, ExamRecordService, AnalysisService
   - 6 controllers - AuthController, ExamController, AdminExamController, AdminQuestionController, AdminWhitelistController, AdminAnalysisController
   - 15 DTO classes in `dto/`
   - Exception handling: ErrorCode (13 codes), BizException, GlobalExceptionHandler
   - Config: SecurityConfig, JwtAuthenticationFilter, MyBatisPlusConfig, CorsConfig
   - Util: JwtUtil
   - `skill/exam-import-skill.md` - AI Skill definition doc

   **Frontend - exam-web/:**
   - Config files: package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, tsconfig.build.json, biome.json
   - `src/main.tsx`, `src/app.css` - Entry point with QueryClientProvider + RouterProvider
   - `src/lib/` - api.ts (fetch wrapper), auth.ts (token management), utils.ts (cn())
   - `src/types/index.ts` - All TS interfaces (User, Exam, Question, ExamRecord, etc.)
   - `src/hooks/` - 7 hooks (use-auth, use-exams, use-records, use-admin-exams, use-admin-questions, use-admin-whitelist, use-admin-analysis)
   - `src/i18n/` - index.ts, zh.json, en.json
   - `src/components/ui/` - 12 Radix UI components (button, input, separator, table, badge, tabs, select, radio-group, textarea, label, dialog, switch)
   - `src/components/layout/` - header.tsx, side-nav.tsx
   - `src/components/` - question-form.tsx, exam-card.tsx, countdown-timer.tsx
   - `src/routes/` - 14 route files covering login, OAuth callback, layout, exams (list/detail/take), records (list/detail), admin exams (list/create/edit/questions/whitelist/analysis)

   **Current state of table prefix changes (exam_ applied, needs to become ex_):**
   
   schema.sql current state (with exam_ prefix):
   - `exam_sys_user` → should be `ex_sys_user`
   - `exam_exam` → should be `ex_exam`
   - `exam_question_bank` → should be `ex_question_bank`
   - `exam_exam_whitelist` → should be `ex_exam_whitelist`
   - `exam_exam_record` → should be `ex_exam_record`
   - `exam_exam_record_question` → should be `ex_exam_record_question`
   - `exam_answer_detail` → should be `ex_answer_detail`

   Entity @TableName current values (all updated to exam_ prefix):
   - `SysUser.java`: `@TableName("exam_sys_user")` → needs `@TableName("ex_sys_user")`
   - `Exam.java`: `@TableName("exam_exam")` → needs `@TableName("ex_exam")`
   - `QuestionBank.java`: `@TableName("exam_question_bank")` → needs `@TableName("ex_question_bank")`
   - `ExamWhitelist.java`: `@TableName("exam_exam_whitelist")` → needs `@TableName("ex_exam_whitelist")`
   - `ExamRecord.java`: `@TableName("exam_exam_record")` → needs `@TableName("ex_exam_record")`
   - `ExamRecordQuestion.java`: `@TableName("exam_exam_record_question")` → needs `@TableName("ex_exam_record_question")`
   - `AnswerDetail.java`: `@TableName("exam_answer_detail")` → needs `@TableName("ex_answer_detail")`

   ExamMapper.xml current state (partially updated with exam_ prefix):
   - `exam_exam_record` → needs `ex_exam_record`
   - `exam_exam` → needs `ex_exam`

   AnalysisMapper.xml (NOT YET UPDATED - still has original table names):
   - References: `exam_record`, `sys_user`, `question_bank`, `answer_detail` → all need ex_ prefix

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Security config issue (Task 4)**: `/api/auth/me` was accidentally covered by `/api/auth/**` permitAll, causing it to skip JWT validation. Fixed by narrowing permitAll to `/api/auth/oauth2/**` only.
   - **Missing validation dependency (Task 11)**: `spring-boot-starter-validation` was not in pom.xml, causing compile errors for `@Valid`, `@NotNull`, etc. Fixed by adding the dependency to pom.xml.
   - **504 Gateway Timeout**: Occurred when generating large responses. User asked to split work into smaller chunks.
   - **Table prefix change**: User first chose "exam_" but the resulting names like "exam_exam_whitelist" were awkward. User interrupted and changed to "ex_" prefix. The "exam_" changes are partially applied and need to be replaced with "ex_".

5. Problem Solving:
   - Broke the large project into 15 manageable tasks
   - Split plan into individual task files per user request
   - Used subagent-driven development to execute each task independently
   - Handled timeout issues by keeping responses concise (outline-only plans, no full code in plans)
   - Currently solving: table prefix rename - was applying "exam_" prefix, user changed mind to "ex_"

6. All user messages:
   - "用这个 superpowers:brainstorming skill, 需求 [PNG path] [skill.txt path]"
   - "纯新建，前后端，先出个设计文档吧"
   - "ok" (multiple times confirming design parts)
   - "没问题" (multiple times confirming design)
   - "继续"
   - "504 Gateway Time-out 为啥还会超时"
   - "这个 superpowers:writing-plans skill [spec path]"
   - "继续"
   - "1-4" then "先按这个，把前后端的都写出来，目录"
   - "先按这个，把前后端的都写出来，目录，只写目录"
   - "ok, 加后面的"
   - "实施计划 有个大纲就可以，不要完整代码"
   - "没问题"
   - "1" (choosing Subagent-Driven execution)
   - "实施计划, 1-3task 一个文件吧，不要全放一个文件里"
   - "继续吧"
   - "全部写完了吗"
   - "表加上统一前缀"
   - Selected "exam_" prefix
   - "ex_ 吧" (changing prefix to ex_)

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Change all table name prefixes from the currently applied "exam_" to "ex_" across:
     1. `schema.sql` - 7 table DDLs
     2. 7 entity files - @TableName annotations
     3. `ExamMapper.xml` - SQL table references
     4. `AnalysisMapper.xml` - SQL table references
     5. Check Service files (ExamRecordService, WhitelistService, etc.) for any hardcoded table names in LambdaQueryWrappers or raw SQL

8. Current Work:
   I was in the middle of applying the "exam_" table prefix when the user interrupted and said "ex_ 吧" (use "ex_" instead). The current state is:
   - **schema.sql**: All 7 tables renamed with "exam_" prefix (needs to change to "ex_")
   - **7 entity @TableName**: All updated to "exam_" prefix (needs to change to "ex_")
   - **ExamMapper.xml**: Partially updated - `exam_record` → `exam_exam_record` and `FROM exam e` → `FROM exam_exam e` applied (needs to change to "ex_" prefix)
   - **AnalysisMapper.xml**: NOT yet updated at all (still has original table names, needs "ex_" prefix)
   
   The user's exact last message was: `"ex_ 吧"` — meaning they want the prefix changed to "ex_" instead of "exam_".

9. Optional Next Step:
   Replace all "exam_" prefixed table names with "ex_" prefix across all affected files:
   - In `schema.sql`: Change `exam_sys_user` → `ex_sys_user`, `exam_exam` → `ex_exam`, `exam_question_bank` → `ex_question_bank`, `exam_exam_whitelist` → `ex_exam_whitelist`, `exam_exam_record` → `ex_exam_record`, `exam_exam_record_question` → `ex_exam_record_question`, `exam_answer_detail` → `ex_answer_detail`
   - In 7 entity files: Update @TableName annotations similarly
   - In `ExamMapper.xml`: Update SQL table references to ex_ prefix
   - In `AnalysisMapper.xml`: Update SQL table references to ex_ prefix (was never updated at all)
   - Check any Service files for hardcoded SQL table references

   User's exact quote triggering this: `"ex_ 吧"` (use ex_ prefix instead)

file.content:
-- ============================================================
-- Exam System DDL
-- ============================================================

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_sys_user` (
    `id`           BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `oa_user_id`   VARCHAR(64)  NOT NULL COMMENT 'OA 系统用户 ID',
    `username`     VARCHAR(64)  NOT NULL COMMENT '用户名',
    `display_name` VARCHAR(64)  NULL     COMMENT '显示名称',
    `is_admin`     TINYINT(1)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否管理员',
    `created_at`   DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at`   DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE INDEX `uk_oa_user_id` (`oa_user_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='系统用户';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_exam` (
    `id`              BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `title`           VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL COMMENT '试卷名称',
    `status`          VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' COMMENT 'draft/published/closed',
    `time_limit_min`  INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '考试时限（分钟），0=不限时',
    `show_answer`     TINYINT(1)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '交卷后是否显示正确答案',
    `show_analysis`   TINYINT(1)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '交卷后是否显示解析',
    `question_count`  INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '动态抽题数，0=全部',
    `max_attempts`    INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '最大考试次数，0=不限',
    `access_mode`     VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open' COMMENT 'open/whitelist',
    `created_by`      BIGINT       NOT NULL COMMENT '创建者 FK sys_user.id',
    `created_at`      DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    `updated_at`      DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_created_by` (`created_by`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_question_bank` (
    `id`              BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `exam_id`         BIGINT       NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK exam.id',
    `content`         TEXT         NOT NULL COMMENT '题目内容',
    `option_a`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `option_b`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `option_c`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `option_d`        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    `correct_answer`  CHAR(1)      NOT NULL COMMENT 'A/B/C/D',
    `analysis`        TEXT         NULL     COMMENT '解析',
    `sort_order`      INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `created_at`      DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_exam_id` (`exam_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='题库';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_exam_whitelist` (
    `id`         BIGINT   NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `exam_id`    BIGINT   NOT NULL,
    `user_id`    BIGINT   NOT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE INDEX `uk_exam_user` (`exam_id`, `user_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试白名单';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_exam_record` (
    `id`         BIGINT       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `exam_id`    BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    `user_id`    BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    `score`      DECIMAL(5,2) NULL     COMMENT '得分',
    `start_time` DATETIME     NOT NULL COMMENT '开始时间',
    `end_time`   DATETIME     NULL     COMMENT '结束时间',
    `status`     VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'in_progress' COMMENT 'in_progress/submitted/timeout',
    `attempt_no` INT          NOT NULL COMMENT '第几次考试',
    `created_at` DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_exam_user` (`exam_id`, `user_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试记录';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_exam_record_question` (
    `id`          BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `record_id`   BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK exam_record.id',
    `question_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK question_bank.id',
    `sort_order`  INT    NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '本次考试中的题序',
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    INDEX `idx_record_id` (`record_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='考试记录-题目关联';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exam_answer_detail` (
    `id`          BIGINT     NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `record_id`   BIGINT     NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK exam_record.id',
    `question_id` BIGINT     NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK question_bank.id',
    `user_answer` CHAR(1)    NULL     COMMENT '用户答案',
    `is_correct`  TINYINT(1) NULL     COMMENT '是否正确',
    `created_at`  DATETIME   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),

file.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="com.exam.mapper.AnalysisMapper">

    <select id="selectScoreAnalysis" resultType="com.exam.dto.ScoreAnalysisResponse">
        SELECT er.user_id, su.display_name, er.score, er.start_time, er.end_time, er.attempt_no
        FROM exam_record er
        JOIN sys_user su ON er.user_id = su.id
        WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId}
          AND er.status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
        ORDER BY er.score DESC, er.end_time ASC
    </select>

    <select id="selectQuestionAnalysis" resultType="com.exam.dto.QuestionAnalysisResponse">
        SELECT qb.id AS question_id, qb.content,
            COUNT(ad.id) AS total_answered,
            SUM(CASE WHEN ad.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correct_count
        FROM question_bank qb
        LEFT JOIN answer_detail ad ON qb.id = ad.question_id
            AND ad.record_id IN (
                SELECT id FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
            )
        WHERE qb.exam_id = #{examId}
        GROUP BY qb.id, qb.content, qb.sort_order
        ORDER BY qb.sort_order
    </select>

</mapper>

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="com.exam.mapper.ExamMapper">

    <select id="selectExamListWithCount" resultType="com.exam.dto.ExamListResponse">
        SELECT e.*,
            (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT er.user_id)
             FROM exam_exam_record er
             WHERE er.exam_id = e.id
               AND er.status IN ('submitted','timeout')) AS respondent_count
        FROM exam_exam e
        ORDER BY e.created_at DESC
    </select>

</mapper>

        SELECT er.user_id, su.display_name, er.score, er.start_time, er.end_time, er.attempt_no
        FROM exam_record er
        JOIN sys_user su ON er.user_id = su.id
        WHERE er.exam_id = #{examId}
          AND er.status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
        ORDER BY er.score DESC, er.end_time ASC
    </select>

    <select id="selectQuestionAnalysis" resultType="com.exam.dto.QuestionAnalysisResponse">
        SELECT qb.id AS question_id, qb.content,
            COUNT(ad.id) AS total_answered,
            SUM(CASE WHEN ad.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correct_count
        FROM question_bank qb
        LEFT JOIN answer_detail ad ON qb.id = ad.question_id
            AND ad.record_id IN (
                SELECT id FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN ('submitted', 'timeout')
            )
        WHERE qb.exam_id = #{examId}
        GROUP BY qb.id, qb.content, qb.sort_order
        ORDER BY qb.sort_order
    </select>

</mapper>

content.text:
`"exam_id"` 那几个是**列名**，不是表名，不需要改。所有表引用都已经改好了。

---

**改动总结：**

把所有表名前缀从 `exam_` 改成 `ex_`，共涉及 **10 个文件**：

| 文件 | 改动 |
|------|------|
| `schema.sql` | 7 个 CREATE TABLE 的表名 `exam_xxx` → `ex_xxx` |
| `SysUser.java` | `@TableName("exam_sys_user")` → `"ex_sys_user"` |
| `Exam.java` | `@TableName("exam_exam")` → `"ex_exam"` |
| `QuestionBank.java` | `@TableName("exam_question_bank")` → `"ex_question_bank"` |
| `ExamWhitelist.java` | `@TableName("exam_exam_whitelist")` → `"ex_exam_whitelist"` |
| `ExamRecord.java` | `@TableName("exam_exam_record")` → `"ex_exam_record"` |
| `ExamRecordQuestion.java` | `@TableName("exam_exam_record_question")` → `"ex_exam_record_question"` |
| `AnswerDetail.java` | `@TableName("exam_answer_detail")` → `"ex_answer_detail"` |
| `ExamMapper.xml` | SQL 里 `exam_exam` → `ex_exam`，`exam_exam_record` → `ex_exam_record` |
| `AnalysisMapper.xml` | SQL 里所有表名加 `ex_` 前缀 |

Service 层没有硬编码表名（都通过 MyBatis-Plus BaseMapper 走实体映射），不需要改。搞定了爹！

然后执行 `exam-system/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql`

### 2. application.yml 里的配置项

让我看下当前配置：

file.content:
server:
  port: ${SERVER_PORT:8080}

spring:
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:mysql://${DB_HOST:localhost}:${DB_PORT:3306}/${DB_NAME:exam_system}?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf-8&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true
    username: ${DB_USERNAME:root}
    password: ${DB_PASSWORD:root}
    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver

  security:
    oauth2:
      client:
        registration:
          default:
            client-id: ${OAUTH2_CLIENT_ID:exam-client}
            client-secret: ${OAUTH2_CLIENT_SECRET:exam-secret}
            authorization-grant-type: authorization_code
            redirect-uri: "{baseUrl}/login/oauth2/code/{registrationId}"
            scope: openid,profile,email
        provider:
          default:
            authorization-uri: ${OAUTH2_AUTH_URI:http://localhost:9000/oauth2/authorize}
            token-uri: ${OAUTH2_TOKEN_URI:http://localhost:9000/oauth2/token}
            user-info-uri: ${OAUTH2_USERINFO_URI:http://localhost:9000/userinfo}

# MyBatis-Plus
mybatis-plus:
  mapper-locations: classpath*:/mapper/**/*.xml
  configuration:
    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true
    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl
  global-config:
    db-config:
      id-type: auto
      logic-delete-field: deleted
      logic-delete-value: 1
      logic-not-delete-value: 0

# JWT
jwt:
  secret: ${JWT_SECRET:YmFzZTY0LWVuY29kZWQtc2VjcmV0LWtleS1mb3ItZXhhbS1zeXN0ZW0tand0}
  expiration: ${JWT_EXPIRATION:86400000}

# CORS
cors:
  allowed-origins: ${CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS:http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:3000}

# Logging
logging:
  level:
    com.exam: debug

content.text:
你需要配的东西，按优先级排：

### 必须配的

| 配置项 | 说明 | 环境变量 |
|--------|------|----------|
| **MySQL 连接** | 数据库地址/账号/密码 | `DB_HOST`, `DB_PORT`, `DB_NAME`, `DB_USERNAME`, `DB_PASSWORD` |
| **OA OAuth2** | 你们 OA 系统的 OAuth2 客户端信息 | `OAUTH2_CLIENT_ID`, `OAUTH2_CLIENT_SECRET` |
| **OA OAuth2 端点** | OA 的授权/令牌/用户信息接口地址 | `OAUTH2_AUTH_URI`, `OAUTH2_TOKEN_URI`, `OAUTH2_USERINFO_URI` |

### 建议改的

| 配置项 | 说明 | 环境变量 |
|--------|------|----------|
| **JWT 密钥** | 生产环境换个强密钥 | `JWT_SECRET` |
| **CORS 域名** | 前端实际部署地址 | `CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS` |

### 可以不动的
- 端口默认 `8080`，前端默认 `5173`（Vite dev server）
- MyBatis-Plus / 日志级别，开发阶段默认值就行

---

你可以直接设环境变量，也可以建个 `application-local.yml` 覆盖。数据库和 OA OAuth2 那几个是必须填的，其他先用默认值就能跑起来。

content.text:
搞定爹，两个 bat 放在 `exams/` 根目录下：

- **`start-backend.bat`** — 启动后端，端口 8080
- **`start-frontend.bat`** — 启动前端，端口 5173

双击就能跑，各开一个窗口。先启动后端，再启动前端。
